gept.pattern: Present Perfect Tense (現在完成式)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示從過去持續到現在的動作或狀態，或對現在仍有影響的過去經驗。常與 for, since, already, yet, ever, just 等副詞連用。
gept.structure: S + have/has + p.p. (+ for/since/already/yet ...)

examples.en: I have lived in Taipei for more than ten years.
examples.zh: 我在台北住了十年以上。

examples.en: She has already finished her English homework.
examples.zh: 她已經寫完英文作業了。

examples.en: Have you ever visited the National Palace Museum?
examples.zh: 你曾經參觀過故宮博物院嗎？

gept.pattern: Comparatives and Superlatives (比較級與最高級)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來比較兩者或三者以上的人事物。短形容詞加 -er/-est，長形容詞用 more/most，並注意 good-better-best 等不規則變化。
gept.structure: S + V + adj-er + than + N ; S + V + the + adj-est + (N) ; S + V + more/most + adj (+ than ...)

examples.en: My new phone is lighter than the old one.
examples.zh: 我的新手機比舊的還要輕。

examples.en: This is the most interesting book I have ever read.
examples.zh: 這是我讀過最有趣的書。

examples.en: Learning English is more difficult than I expected.
examples.zh: 學英文比我預期的還要困難。

gept.pattern: Conditional Sentences: Type 1 and Type 2 (條件句第一型與第二型)
gept.meaning_zh: Type 1 表示未來可能發生的條件 (if + 現在式, will + V)；Type 2 表示與現在事實相反的假設 (if + 過去式, would + V)。
gept.structure: Type 1: If + S + V(現在式), S + will + V. ; Type 2: If + S + V(過去式), S + would + V.

examples.en: If it rains tomorrow, we will cancel the picnic.
examples.zh: 如果明天下雨，我們就取消野餐。

examples.en: If I had more money, I would travel around the world.
examples.zh: 如果我有更多錢，我會環遊世界。

examples.en: If she were here, she would know what to do.
examples.zh: 如果她在這裡，她就會知道該怎麼辦。

gept.pattern: Passive Voice (被動語態)
gept.meaning_zh: 強調動作的承受者而非動作的執行者，由 be 動詞加上過去分詞構成。執行者可用 by 帶出，必要時可省略。
gept.structure: S + be + p.p. (+ by + 行為者)

examples.en: The report was written by our new colleague.
examples.zh: 這份報告是由我們的新同事撰寫的。

examples.en: English is spoken in many countries around the world.
examples.zh: 英文在世界上許多國家被使用。

examples.en: The package will be delivered tomorrow morning.
examples.zh: 這個包裹明天早上會被送達。

gept.pattern: Relative Pronouns (關係代名詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來引導形容詞子句以修飾前面的先行詞。who 指人，which 指物，that 兩者皆可，whose 表示所有格。
gept.structure: N (先行詞) + who/which/that/whose + V ...

examples.en: The student who won the speech contest is my classmate.
examples.zh: 贏得演講比賽的那位學生是我的同學。

examples.en: This is the restaurant which serves the best beef noodles.
examples.zh: 這就是賣最棒牛肉麵的餐廳。

examples.en: I met a girl whose father is a famous doctor.
examples.zh: 我遇到一個女孩，她的父親是有名的醫生。

gept.pattern: Gerunds and Infinitives (動名詞與不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 某些動詞後接動名詞 (V-ing)，如 enjoy, finish, avoid, mind；某些動詞後接不定式 (to V)，如 decide, hope, plan, want。
gept.structure: S + V + V-ing ; S + V + to + V

examples.en: I enjoy listening to English songs in my free time.
examples.zh: 我空閒時喜歡聽英文歌。

examples.en: She decided to study abroad next year.
examples.zh: 她決定明年出國念書。

examples.en: Please avoid making noise in the library.
examples.zh: 請避免在圖書館內製造噪音。

gept.pattern: Simple Present Tense - habits (現在簡單式,習慣)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來描述日常習慣或經常做的事情，常搭配 always、usually、often、sometimes 等頻率副詞。
gept.structure: S + V(s/es) + O

examples.en: She drinks coffee every morning.
examples.zh: 她每天早上都喝咖啡。

examples.en: I usually walk to school.
examples.zh: 我通常走路上學。

gept.pattern: Simple Present Tense - general truths (現在簡單式,一般真理)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達不變的事實、科學定律或普遍真理。
gept.structure: S + V(s/es)

examples.en: The sun rises in the east.
examples.zh: 太陽從東邊升起。

examples.en: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.
examples.zh: 水在攝氏一百度沸騰。

gept.pattern: Simple Present Tense - scheduled future (現在簡單式,時刻表未來)
gept.meaning_zh: 用於表達依照時刻表或行程安排的未來事件，常見於交通、節目時刻。
gept.structure: S + V(s/es) + 未來時間

examples.en: The train leaves at 7 p.m. tomorrow.
examples.zh: 火車明天晚上七點出發。

examples.en: The movie starts at eight tonight.
examples.zh: 電影今晚八點開始。

gept.pattern: Simple Present Tense - states and facts (現在簡單式,狀態事實)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來陳述目前的狀態、身分或事實。
gept.structure: S + be / V(s/es)

examples.en: He is a doctor.
examples.zh: 他是一位醫生。

examples.en: They live in Taipei.
examples.zh: 他們住在台北。

gept.pattern: Present Continuous Tense (現在進行式)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達說話當下正在進行的動作，搭配 now、right now、at the moment 等。
gept.structure: S + am/is/are + V-ing

examples.en: I am reading a book now.
examples.zh: 我現在正在看書。

examples.en: They are playing basketball at the moment.
examples.zh: 他們此刻正在打籃球。

gept.pattern: Present Continuous Tense - arranged future (現在進行式,已安排未來)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達已經安排或計畫好的未來行程，通常有明確時間。
gept.structure: S + am/is/are + V-ing + 未來時間

examples.en: I am meeting John tomorrow afternoon.
examples.zh: 我明天下午要和約翰見面。

examples.en: She is flying to Tokyo next week.
examples.zh: 她下週要飛去東京。

gept.pattern: Present Continuous Tense - temporary situations (現在進行式,暫時狀況)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來描述目前一段時間正在進行、但屬於暫時性的動作或情況。
gept.structure: S + am/is/are + V-ing

examples.en: He is staying with his uncle this month.
examples.zh: 他這個月暫住在他叔叔家。

examples.en: I am working from home these days.
examples.zh: 我這陣子都在家工作。

gept.pattern: Present Continuous Tense - changing situations (現在進行式,變化中)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達正在改變或發展中的情況，常與 get、become、grow、change 等動詞連用。
gept.structure: S + am/is/are + getting/becoming + adj

examples.en: The weather is getting colder.
examples.zh: 天氣正變得越來越冷。

examples.en: My English is improving.
examples.zh: 我的英文正在進步。

gept.pattern: Stative Verbs - no continuous (狀態動詞,不用進行式)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示感受、思想、擁有等狀態的動詞通常不使用進行式，例如 know、believe、like、own、belong。
gept.structure: S + 狀態動詞 (現在簡單式)

examples.en: I know the answer.
examples.zh: 我知道答案。

examples.en: She likes chocolate.
examples.zh: 她喜歡巧克力。

gept.pattern: Simple Past Tense - completed action (過去簡單式,已完成動作)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來描述過去某個明確時間點完成的動作，常搭配 yesterday、last week、ago 等時間詞。
gept.structure: S + V-ed / 不規則過去式

examples.en: I visited my grandma last weekend.
examples.zh: 我上週末去看了奶奶。

examples.en: He bought a new bike yesterday.
examples.zh: 他昨天買了一輛新腳踏車。

gept.pattern: Simple Past Tense - historical facts (過去簡單式,歷史事實)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來描述歷史上發生過的事件或人物的事蹟。
gept.structure: S + V-ed (過去式)

examples.en: Columbus arrived in America in 1492.
examples.zh: 哥倫布在一四九二年抵達美洲。

examples.en: World War II ended in 1945.
examples.zh: 第二次世界大戰於一九四五年結束。

gept.pattern: Simple Past Tense - past habits (過去簡單式,過去習慣)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來描述過去經常發生、現在不一定持續的習慣，可搭配頻率副詞。
gept.structure: S + V-ed + 頻率副詞

examples.en: She always walked to school as a child.
examples.zh: 她小時候總是走路上學。

examples.en: We often played by the river.
examples.zh: 我們以前常在河邊玩。

gept.pattern: Past Continuous Tense (過去進行式)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達過去某個時間點正在進行的動作。
gept.structure: S + was/were + V-ing

examples.en: I was watching TV at 8 p.m. last night.
examples.zh: 我昨晚八點正在看電視。

examples.en: They were studying when I called.
examples.zh: 我打電話時他們正在念書。

gept.pattern: Past Continuous Tense - interrupted action (過去進行式,動作被打斷)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達一個過去正在進行的動作被另一個短暫動作打斷，常與 when 搭配。
gept.structure: S + was/were + V-ing + when + S + V-ed

examples.en: I was taking a shower when the phone rang.
examples.zh: 我正在洗澡時，電話響了。

examples.en: She was cooking when the power went out.
examples.zh: 她正在煮飯時，停電了。

gept.pattern: Past Continuous Tense - two parallel actions (過去進行式,同時發生)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來描述過去同一時間兩個動作同時進行，常與 while 連用。
gept.structure: S + was/were + V-ing + while + S + was/were + V-ing

examples.en: I was reading while my brother was playing games.
examples.zh: 我在看書時，弟弟在打電動。

examples.en: She was singing while he was playing the guitar.
examples.zh: 她在唱歌時，他在彈吉他。

gept.pattern: Present Perfect Tense - experience (現在完成式,經驗)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達到目前為止的人生經驗，常搭配 ever、never、before。
gept.structure: S + have/has + p.p.

examples.en: I have been to Japan twice.
examples.zh: 我去過日本兩次。

examples.en: She has never tried sushi before.
examples.zh: 她從未嘗試過壽司。

gept.pattern: Present Perfect Tense - unfinished period (現在完成式,持續至今)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達從過去某時間開始持續到現在的狀態或動作，常搭配 for、since。
gept.structure: S + have/has + p.p. + for/since + 時間

examples.en: I have lived here for ten years.
examples.zh: 我在這裡住了十年了。

examples.en: He has worked at this company since 2015.
examples.zh: 他從二零一五年起就在這家公司工作。

gept.pattern: Present Perfect Tense - recent past (現在完成式,剛完成)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達剛剛完成或最近完成的動作，常搭配 just、already、recently、lately。
gept.structure: S + have/has + just/already + p.p.

examples.en: I have just finished my homework.
examples.zh: 我剛剛寫完功課。

examples.en: She has already eaten lunch.
examples.zh: 她已經吃過午餐了。

gept.pattern: Present Perfect Tense - with yet (現在完成式,yet 否定與疑問)
gept.meaning_zh: yet 用於否定句和疑問句，表達某動作尚未發生或詢問是否已完成。
gept.structure: S + haven't/hasn't + p.p. + yet / Have/Has + S + p.p. + yet?

examples.en: I haven't finished the report yet.
examples.zh: 我還沒寫完報告。

examples.en: Have you eaten dinner yet?
examples.zh: 你吃過晚餐了嗎？

gept.pattern: Present Perfect Tense - result in present (現在完成式,過去動作影響現在)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來強調過去發生的動作對現在造成的結果或影響。
gept.structure: S + have/has + p.p.

examples.en: I have lost my keys, so I can't get in.
examples.zh: 我把鑰匙弄丟了，所以進不了門。

examples.en: He has broken his leg, so he can't play.
examples.zh: 他摔斷了腿，所以不能踢球。

gept.pattern: Simple Past vs Present Perfect (過去式與現在完成式比較)
gept.meaning_zh: 過去式用於明確過去時間的動作；現在完成式用於不指明確時間或仍與現在相關的動作。
gept.structure: S + V-ed (具體時間) / S + have/has + p.p. (不指明時間)

examples.en: I saw that movie last week.
examples.zh: 我上週看了那部電影。

examples.en: I have seen that movie before.
examples.zh: 我以前看過那部電影。

gept.pattern: Present Perfect Continuous Tense (現在完成進行式)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來強調某動作從過去持續進行到現在，並可能仍在進行，常搭配 for、since。
gept.structure: S + have/has + been + V-ing

examples.en: I have been studying English for three hours.
examples.zh: 我已經念英文念了三個小時了。

examples.en: She has been waiting since noon.
examples.zh: 她從中午就一直等到現在。

gept.pattern: Past Perfect Tense (過去完成式)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達過去某時間點之前已經完成的動作，常用於描述過去兩件事的先後順序。
gept.structure: S + had + p.p.

examples.en: When I arrived, the train had already left.
examples.zh: 我到達時，火車已經開走了。

examples.en: She had finished dinner before he came home.
examples.zh: 她在他回家前就吃完晚餐了。

gept.pattern: Past Perfect Tense - sequence (過去完成式,過去事件順序)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來明確指出在過去兩個動作中，哪一個先發生，先發生的用過去完成式。
gept.structure: S + had + p.p. + before/when + S + V-ed

examples.en: He had eaten before I called him.
examples.zh: 我打給他之前，他就已經吃過了。

examples.en: They had left when we got there.
examples.zh: 我們到達時，他們已經離開了。

gept.pattern: Past Perfect Continuous Tense (過去完成進行式)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達過去某時間點之前，已持續進行一段時間的動作。
gept.structure: S + had + been + V-ing

examples.en: She had been studying for two hours when I arrived.
examples.zh: 我到達時，她已經念了兩小時的書。

examples.en: They had been waiting for an hour before the bus came.
examples.zh: 公車來之前，他們已經等了一小時。

gept.pattern: Simple Future Tense - will for predictions (未來簡單式,預測)
gept.meaning_zh: will 用來表達對未來的預測或推測，常搭配 think、believe、probably。
gept.structure: S + will + V

examples.en: I think it will rain tomorrow.
examples.zh: 我想明天會下雨。

examples.en: She will probably be late.
examples.zh: 她可能會遲到。

gept.pattern: Simple Future Tense - will for decisions (未來簡單式,當下決定)
gept.meaning_zh: will 用於說話當下臨時做出的決定，表達自願或承諾。
gept.structure: S + will + V

examples.en: I will help you with the bags.
examples.zh: 我來幫你拿袋子。

examples.en: OK, I will call him right now.
examples.zh: 好，我現在就打給他。

gept.pattern: Be Going To - plans (be going to,計畫)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達說話前已經想好或計畫好的未來打算。
gept.structure: S + am/is/are + going to + V

examples.en: I am going to visit my aunt this weekend.
examples.zh: 我這週末要去看姑姑。

examples.en: They are going to start a new business.
examples.zh: 他們打算開創新事業。

gept.pattern: Be Going To - evidence-based prediction (be going to,有跡象的預測)
gept.meaning_zh: 當有明顯跡象顯示某事即將發生時，用 be going to 表示預測。
gept.structure: S + am/is/are + going to + V

examples.en: Look at those clouds! It is going to rain.
examples.zh: 你看那些雲！要下雨了。

examples.en: He is going to fall off the ladder.
examples.zh: 他要從梯子上摔下來了。

gept.pattern: Will vs Be Going To (will 與 be going to 的差異)
gept.meaning_zh: will 多用於當下決定或單純預測；be going to 用於事先計畫或基於現有跡象的預測。
gept.structure: S + will / be going to + V

examples.en: I will answer the phone.
examples.zh: 我來接電話。

examples.en: I am going to study abroad next year.
examples.zh: 我明年要出國念書。

gept.pattern: Be About To (即將要做)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達非常接近、立刻要發生的動作，通常在幾分鐘內。
gept.structure: S + am/is/are + about to + V

examples.en: The movie is about to start.
examples.zh: 電影馬上要開始了。

examples.en: I am about to leave the office.
examples.zh: 我正要離開辦公室。

gept.pattern: Future Continuous Tense (未來進行式)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達未來某個時間點正在進行的動作。
gept.structure: S + will + be + V-ing

examples.en: This time tomorrow I will be flying to Paris.
examples.zh: 明天這個時候，我將正在飛往巴黎。

examples.en: At 8 p.m. she will be having dinner.
examples.zh: 晚上八點她會正在吃晚餐。

gept.pattern: Future Perfect Tense (未來完成式)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達在未來某個時間點之前已完成的動作，常搭配 by + 時間。
gept.structure: S + will + have + p.p. + by + 時間

examples.en: I will have finished the project by next Friday.
examples.zh: 我下週五之前會完成這個專案。

examples.en: By 2030, he will have graduated from college.
examples.zh: 到二零三零年，他將會大學畢業。

gept.pattern: Future Perfect Continuous Tense (未來完成進行式)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達到未來某時間點，動作已持續進行了多久。
gept.structure: S + will + have + been + V-ing + for + 時間

examples.en: By June, I will have been working here for ten years.
examples.zh: 到六月時，我將會在這裡工作滿十年。

examples.en: By midnight, they will have been driving for eight hours.
examples.zh: 到午夜時，他們將已開了八個小時的車。

gept.pattern: Used To (過去經常)
gept.meaning_zh: used to 用來表達過去經常或習慣做、但現在不再做的事，或過去存在現在不存在的狀態。
gept.structure: S + used to + V (原形)

examples.en: I used to play piano when I was young.
examples.zh: 我小時候常常彈鋼琴。

examples.en: There used to be a bakery on this corner.
examples.zh: 這個轉角以前有一間麵包店。

gept.pattern: Would for Past Habits (would 表過去習慣)
gept.meaning_zh: would 用來表達過去重複發生的動作習慣，但不能用於過去的狀態。
gept.structure: S + would + V (原形)

examples.en: Every summer we would visit our grandparents.
examples.zh: 每年夏天我們都會去看祖父母。

examples.en: He would always tell us bedtime stories.
examples.zh: 他以前總是會講床邊故事給我們聽。

gept.pattern: Used To vs Would (used to 與 would 的差異)
gept.meaning_zh: used to 可用於動作和狀態；would 只能用於重複動作，不能用於狀態。
gept.structure: S + used to / would + V

examples.en: I used to live in Tokyo. (狀態)
examples.zh: 我以前住在東京。

examples.en: We would go fishing every Sunday. (動作)
examples.zh: 我們以前每週日都會去釣魚。

gept.pattern: Time Markers: last, ago, yesterday (過去式時間標誌)
gept.meaning_zh: last week、yesterday、in 2010、... ago 等明確過去時間，需搭配過去簡單式。
gept.structure: S + V-ed + last / yesterday / ago

examples.en: She arrived three days ago.
examples.zh: 她三天前抵達。

examples.en: We watched a movie last night.
examples.zh: 我們昨晚看了一部電影。

gept.pattern: Time Markers: for, since (現在完成式時間標誌)
gept.meaning_zh: for 接時間長度（如 for two years）；since 接時間起點（如 since 2020），搭配現在完成式。
gept.structure: S + have/has + p.p. + for/since + 時間

examples.en: I have known him for five years.
examples.zh: 我認識他五年了。

examples.en: She has been ill since Monday.
examples.zh: 她從週一開始就生病了。

gept.pattern: Time Markers: already, yet, just (現在完成式副詞)
gept.meaning_zh: already 用於肯定句強調已完成；yet 用於否定/疑問句表尚未；just 表剛剛。
gept.structure: have/has + already/just + p.p. / haven't + p.p. + yet

examples.en: I have already done my homework.
examples.zh: 我已經做完功課了。

examples.en: He hasn't arrived yet.
examples.zh: 他還沒到。

gept.pattern: Time Markers: ever, never (現在完成式經驗副詞)
gept.meaning_zh: ever 用於疑問句問經驗；never 用於否定表示從未做過。
gept.structure: Have/Has + S + ever + p.p.? / S + have/has + never + p.p.

examples.en: Have you ever been to Korea?
examples.zh: 你曾經去過韓國嗎？

examples.en: I have never seen snow.
examples.zh: 我從未看過雪。

gept.pattern: Time Markers: by plus future time (未來完成式時間標誌)
gept.meaning_zh: by + 未來時間表達截至某時間點之前；常與未來完成式搭配。
gept.structure: S + will + have + p.p. + by + 時間

examples.en: By next year, I will have saved enough money.
examples.zh: 到明年，我將會存到足夠的錢。

examples.en: She will have left by 5 p.m.
examples.zh: 她下午五點前就會離開。

gept.pattern: Time Markers: lately, recently (近期完成式副詞)
gept.meaning_zh: lately 和 recently 表達最近一段時間，常與現在完成式或現在完成進行式搭配。
gept.structure: S + have/has + (been) + p.p./V-ing + lately/recently

examples.en: I haven't seen him lately.
examples.zh: 我最近都沒見到他。

examples.en: She has been feeling tired recently.
examples.zh: 她最近一直覺得很累。

gept.pattern: Reported Speech - tense backshift (轉述句,時態後移)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述他人話語時，動詞時態通常向過去後移一格，例如現在式變過去式。
gept.structure: 主要動詞過去式 + that + 子句 (時態後移)

examples.en: He said that he was tired.
examples.zh: 他說他很累。

examples.en: She told me that she had finished the book.
examples.zh: 她告訴我她已經看完那本書了。

gept.pattern: Reported Speech - no backshift (轉述句,不需後移)
gept.meaning_zh: 若敘述為普遍真理或情況仍然成立，轉述時可不後移時態。
gept.structure: 主要動詞過去式 + that + 現在式

examples.en: He said that the earth is round.
examples.zh: 他說地球是圓的。

examples.en: She said she likes coffee.
examples.zh: 她說她喜歡咖啡。

gept.pattern: Zero Conditional (條件句零型,一般真理)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來表達一般真理、科學事實或自然法則，兩個子句都用現在簡單式。
gept.structure: If + S + V (現在式), S + V (現在式)

examples.en: If you heat ice, it melts.
examples.zh: 如果你加熱冰，它會融化。

examples.en: If it rains, the ground gets wet.
examples.zh: 如果下雨，地面會變濕。

gept.pattern: Frequency Adverbs with Present Tense (頻率副詞加現在式)
gept.meaning_zh: always、usually、often、sometimes、rarely、never 等頻率副詞通常放在一般動詞前、be 動詞後。
gept.structure: S + 頻率副詞 + V / S + be + 頻率副詞

examples.en: He always arrives on time.
examples.zh: 他總是準時到達。

examples.en: She is rarely late for class.
examples.zh: 她很少上課遲到。

gept.pattern: Time Clauses: when, after, before plus present for future (時間子句用現在式表未來)
gept.meaning_zh: 在 when、after、before、until、as soon as 等時間連接詞引導的子句中，用現在式表達未來意義。
gept.structure: 主句 will + V, when/after/before + S + V (現在式)

examples.en: I will call you when I arrive.
examples.zh: 我到的時候會打電話給你。

examples.en: We will leave after she comes back.
examples.zh: 她回來後我們就走。

gept.pattern: Time Clauses: until plus present for future (until 子句用現在式表未來)
gept.meaning_zh: until 引導的時間子句即使表達未來，也使用現在式。
gept.structure: 主句 will + V, until + S + V (現在式)

examples.en: I will wait here until you come back.
examples.zh: 你回來之前我會在這裡等。

examples.en: She won't leave until the meeting ends.
examples.zh: 會議結束前她不會離開。

gept.pattern: Tense Consistency in Subordinate Clauses (從屬子句時態一致)
gept.meaning_zh: 主句為過去式時，從屬子句通常也使用過去式或過去完成式，保持時態一致。
gept.structure: 主句 V-ed + that + S + V-ed / had p.p.

examples.en: I knew that he was sick.
examples.zh: 我知道他生病了。

examples.en: She thought that he had already left.
examples.zh: 她以為他已經離開了。

gept.pattern: Can: ability (Can 表能力)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達能力，「會、能夠」做某事。
gept.structure: 主詞 + can + 原形動詞

examples.en: She can speak three languages fluently.
examples.zh: 她能流利地說三種語言。

examples.en: I can swim across the river.
examples.zh: 我能游過這條河。

gept.pattern: Could: past ability (Could 表過去能力)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達過去的能力，「以前能夠」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + could + 原形動詞

examples.en: When I was young, I could run very fast.
examples.zh: 我年輕時跑得非常快。

examples.en: He could play the piano at the age of five.
examples.zh: 他五歲時就會彈鋼琴。

gept.pattern: Can and Could: permission (Can 與 Could 表許可)
gept.meaning_zh: 請求或給予許可，could 較有禮貌。
gept.structure: Can / Could + 主詞 + 原形動詞？

examples.en: Can I borrow your pen, please?
examples.zh: 我可以借你的筆嗎？

examples.en: Could I use your phone for a moment?
examples.zh: 我可以借用一下你的電話嗎？

gept.pattern: May: formal permission (May 表正式許可)
gept.meaning_zh: 正式地請求或給予許可。
gept.structure: May + 主詞 + 原形動詞？

examples.en: May I come in, sir?
examples.zh: 先生，我可以進來嗎？

examples.en: You may leave the classroom now.
examples.zh: 你現在可以離開教室了。

gept.pattern: May and Might: possibility (May 與 Might 表可能性)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達可能性，might 通常較不確定。
gept.structure: 主詞 + may / might + 原形動詞

examples.en: It may rain this afternoon.
examples.zh: 今天下午可能會下雨。

examples.en: She might be at the library now.
examples.zh: 她現在可能在圖書館。

gept.pattern: Must: obligation (Must 表義務)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達強烈的義務或必要，「必須」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + must + 原形動詞

examples.en: You must wear a seatbelt in the car.
examples.zh: 你在車裡必須繫安全帶。

examples.en: Students must hand in their homework on time.
examples.zh: 學生必須準時交作業。

gept.pattern: Must: deduction (Must 表推論)
gept.meaning_zh: 根據證據做出強烈推論，「一定是」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + must + be / 原形動詞

examples.en: You haven't eaten all day. You must be hungry.
examples.zh: 你一整天沒吃東西，你一定很餓。

examples.en: The lights are on. They must be home.
examples.zh: 燈亮著，他們一定在家。

gept.pattern: Mustn't: prohibition (Mustn't 表禁止)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達禁止，「絕對不可以」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + mustn't + 原形動詞

examples.en: You mustn't smoke in the hospital.
examples.zh: 你不可以在醫院裡抽菸。

examples.en: Children mustn't play with matches.
examples.zh: 小孩不可以玩火柴。

gept.pattern: Should and Ought To: advice (Should 與 Ought To 表建議)
gept.meaning_zh: 給予建議，「應該」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + should / ought to + 原形動詞

examples.en: You should drink more water every day.
examples.zh: 你每天應該多喝水。

examples.en: He ought to apologize for being late.
examples.zh: 他應該為遲到道歉。

gept.pattern: Shouldn't: negative advice (Shouldn't 表否定建議)
gept.meaning_zh: 給予否定的建議，「不應該」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + shouldn't + 原形動詞

examples.en: You shouldn't eat so much junk food.
examples.zh: 你不應該吃這麼多垃圾食物。

examples.en: We shouldn't judge people by their appearance.
examples.zh: 我們不應該以貌取人。

gept.pattern: Will: prediction and future (Will 表預測與未來)
gept.meaning_zh: 預測或表達未來的決定。
gept.structure: 主詞 + will + 原形動詞

examples.en: It will be sunny tomorrow.
examples.zh: 明天會是晴天。

examples.en: I will help you with your homework.
examples.zh: 我會幫你做功課。

gept.pattern: Would: polite request (Would 表禮貌請求)
gept.meaning_zh: 禮貌地請求他人做某事。
gept.structure: Would + 主詞 + 原形動詞？

examples.en: Would you please open the window?
examples.zh: 可以麻煩你打開窗戶嗎？

examples.en: Would you like some tea?
examples.zh: 你想喝點茶嗎？

gept.pattern: Would: past habit and hypothetical (Would 表過去習慣與假設)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達過去習慣或假設情境。
gept.structure: 主詞 + would + 原形動詞

examples.en: When I was a child, we would go fishing every summer.
examples.zh: 我小時候，我們每年夏天都會去釣魚。

examples.en: I would travel the world if I were rich.
examples.zh: 如果我有錢，我會環遊世界。

gept.pattern: Shall: suggestion and offer (Shall 表提議)
gept.meaning_zh: 用於提議或詢問對方意見，多用於主詞 I/We。
gept.structure: Shall + I / we + 原形動詞？

examples.en: Shall we dance?
examples.zh: 我們跳支舞好嗎？

examples.en: Shall I open the door for you?
examples.zh: 要我幫你開門嗎？

gept.pattern: Must Have + p.p.: past deduction (Must Have 過去分詞,過去推論)
gept.meaning_zh: 對過去事件的強烈推論，「一定已經」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + must have + 過去分詞

examples.en: The ground is wet; it must have rained last night.
examples.zh: 地是濕的，昨晚一定下過雨。

examples.en: She must have forgotten about the meeting.
examples.zh: 她一定是忘了這場會議。

gept.pattern: Should Have + p.p.: past regret (Should Have 過去分詞,過去遺憾)
gept.meaning_zh: 對過去未做之事的遺憾，「早該」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + should have + 過去分詞

examples.en: I should have studied harder for the exam.
examples.zh: 我應該更努力準備考試的。

examples.en: You should have told me the truth.
examples.zh: 你早該告訴我實話。

gept.pattern: Could Have + p.p.: past possibility (Could Have 過去分詞,過去可能)
gept.meaning_zh: 過去可能但沒發生的事，「本來可以」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + could have + 過去分詞

examples.en: You could have hurt yourself.
examples.zh: 你本來可能會受傷的。

examples.en: We could have won the game.
examples.zh: 我們本來可以贏得比賽。

gept.pattern: Might Have + p.p.: past uncertainty (Might Have 過去分詞,過去不確定)
gept.meaning_zh: 對過去的不確定推論，「也許已經」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + might have + 過去分詞

examples.en: He might have missed the bus.
examples.zh: 他可能錯過了公車。

examples.en: They might have left already.
examples.zh: 他們也許已經離開了。

gept.pattern: Have To: necessity (Have To 表必要)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達外在的必要性，「必須」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + have / has to + 原形動詞

examples.en: I have to wake up at six tomorrow.
examples.zh: 我明天必須六點起床。

examples.en: She has to take care of her brother.
examples.zh: 她必須照顧她的弟弟。

gept.pattern: Don't Have To: no necessity (Don't Have To 表不必)
gept.meaning_zh: 沒有必要，「不必」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + don't / doesn't have to + 原形動詞

examples.en: You don't have to come if you're busy.
examples.zh: 如果你很忙，你不必來。

examples.en: He doesn't have to wear a uniform at work.
examples.zh: 他上班不必穿制服。

gept.pattern: Need To (Need To 表需要)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達需要做某事。
gept.structure: 主詞 + need to + 原形動詞

examples.en: I need to finish this report by Friday.
examples.zh: 我必須在週五前完成這份報告。

examples.en: You need to drink more water.
examples.zh: 你需要多喝水。

gept.pattern: Used To (過去習慣或狀態)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示過去的習慣或狀態，現已不再。
gept.structure: 主詞 + used to + 原形動詞

examples.en: I used to live in Taipei.
examples.zh: 我以前住在台北。

examples.en: She used to be very shy.
examples.zh: 她以前很害羞。

gept.pattern: Be Able To (Be Able To 表能力)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達能力，可用於各種時態。
gept.structure: 主詞 + be 動詞 + able to + 原形動詞

examples.en: I was able to solve the puzzle.
examples.zh: 我能夠解開那個謎題。

examples.en: Will you be able to come to the party?
examples.zh: 你能來參加派對嗎？

gept.pattern: Had Better (Had Better 表強烈建議)
gept.meaning_zh: 提出強烈建議或警告，「最好」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + had better (+ not) + 原形動詞

examples.en: You had better see a doctor.
examples.zh: 你最好去看醫生。

examples.en: We had better not be late again.
examples.zh: 我們最好不要再遲到了。

gept.pattern: First Conditional - real future (第一條件句,真實未來)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達未來可能發生的事。
gept.structure: If + 主詞 + 現在簡單式, 主詞 + will + 原形動詞

examples.en: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay home.
examples.zh: 如果明天下雨，我們就待在家。

examples.en: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
examples.zh: 如果你用功讀書，就會通過考試。

gept.pattern: Second Conditional - unreal present (第二條件句,與現在相反)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達與現在事實相反的假設。
gept.structure: If + 主詞 + 過去簡單式, 主詞 + would + 原形動詞

examples.en: If I were you, I would tell the truth.
examples.zh: 如果我是你，我會說實話。

examples.en: If she had more time, she would learn French.
examples.zh: 如果她有更多時間，她會學法文。

gept.pattern: Third Conditional - unreal past (第三條件句,與過去相反)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達與過去事實相反的假設。
gept.structure: If + 主詞 + 過去完成式, 主詞 + would have + 過去分詞

examples.en: If I had known, I would have helped you.
examples.zh: 如果我早知道，我就會幫你了。

examples.en: If they had left earlier, they would have caught the train.
examples.zh: 如果他們早點出發，就趕上火車了。

gept.pattern: Mixed Conditional - past to present (混合條件句,過去影響現在)
gept.meaning_zh: 過去的假設影響現在的結果。
gept.structure: If + 主詞 + 過去完成式, 主詞 + would + 原形動詞

examples.en: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.
examples.zh: 如果我當初讀醫學，我現在就是醫生了。

examples.en: If he had taken the job, he would be rich today.
examples.zh: 如果他當初接受那份工作，他今天就富有了。

gept.pattern: Mixed Conditional - present to past (混合條件句,現在影響過去)
gept.meaning_zh: 現在的狀況影響過去的結果。
gept.structure: If + 主詞 + 過去簡單式, 主詞 + would have + 過去分詞

examples.en: If I were taller, I would have joined the basketball team.
examples.zh: 如果我長得高一點，我就會加入籃球隊了。

examples.en: If she weren't so shy, she would have spoken up.
examples.zh: 如果她不那麼害羞，當時就會發言了。

gept.pattern: Unless: equals if not (Unless 表除非)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達「除非」，相當於 if not。
gept.structure: Unless + 主詞 + 現在簡單式, 主詞 + will + 原形動詞

examples.en: Unless you hurry, you will miss the bus.
examples.zh: 除非你快點，否則你會錯過公車。

examples.en: I won't go unless you come with me.
examples.zh: 除非你和我一起去，否則我不去。

gept.pattern: As Long As and Provided That (As Long As 與 Provided That 表只要)
gept.meaning_zh: 表達「只要」、「假如」的條件。
gept.structure: 主詞 + will + 原形動詞 + as long as / provided that + 子句

examples.en: You can borrow my car as long as you drive carefully.
examples.zh: 只要你小心開車，你可以借我的車。

examples.en: I will help you provided that you ask politely.
examples.zh: 假如你禮貌地請求，我就會幫你。

gept.pattern: Suppose and What If (Suppose 與 What If 表假設)
gept.meaning_zh: 提出假設情境，「假設…呢？」。
gept.structure: Suppose / What if + 主詞 + 過去簡單式？

examples.en: What if you lost your job tomorrow?
examples.zh: 如果你明天失業了怎麼辦？

examples.en: Suppose he refused to help, what would we do?
examples.zh: 假設他拒絕幫忙，我們該怎麼辦？

gept.pattern: Inversion: Had I Known (倒裝,第三條件句省略 if)
gept.meaning_zh: 第三條件句倒裝，省略 if 後將 had 提前。
gept.structure: Had + 主詞 + 過去分詞, 主詞 + would have + 過去分詞

examples.en: Had I known about the meeting, I would have come.
examples.zh: 早知道有這場會議，我就會來了。

examples.en: Had she studied harder, she would have passed.
examples.zh: 她要是更用功，當時就通過了。

gept.pattern: Inversion: Were I To (倒裝,第二條件句假設語氣)
gept.meaning_zh: 第二條件句倒裝，強調假設語氣。
gept.structure: Were + 主詞 + to + 原形動詞, 主詞 + would + 原形動詞

examples.en: Were I to win the lottery, I would travel the world.
examples.zh: 假如我中樂透，我就會環遊世界。

examples.en: Were he to apologize, she might forgive him.
examples.zh: 假如他道歉，她也許會原諒他。

gept.pattern: Inversion: Should You (倒裝,第一條件句正式表達)
gept.meaning_zh: 第一條件句倒裝，用於正式表達。
gept.structure: Should + 主詞 + 原形動詞, 主詞 + will / would + 原形動詞

examples.en: Should you need help, please call me.
examples.zh: 萬一你需要幫助，請打給我。

examples.en: Should it rain, the picnic will be canceled.
examples.zh: 萬一下雨，野餐將取消。

gept.pattern: Passive: simple present (現在簡單式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態現在簡單式。
gept.structure: 主詞 + am / is / are + 過去分詞 (+ by + 行為者)

examples.en: English is spoken in many countries.
examples.zh: 英語在許多國家被使用。

examples.en: The office is cleaned every day.
examples.zh: 辦公室每天都被打掃。

gept.pattern: Passive: simple past (過去簡單式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態過去簡單式。
gept.structure: 主詞 + was / were + 過去分詞

examples.en: The window was broken by the boy.
examples.zh: 窗戶被那男孩打破了。

examples.en: These books were written by a famous author.
examples.zh: 這些書是由一位著名作家寫的。

gept.pattern: Passive: present continuous (現在進行式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態現在進行式。
gept.structure: 主詞 + am / is / are + being + 過去分詞

examples.en: The road is being repaired right now.
examples.zh: 這條路正在被修理。

examples.en: New houses are being built in our neighborhood.
examples.zh: 我們社區正在興建新房子。

gept.pattern: Passive: past continuous (過去進行式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態過去進行式。
gept.structure: 主詞 + was / were + being + 過去分詞

examples.en: The cake was being eaten when I arrived.
examples.zh: 我到達時，蛋糕正被吃掉。

examples.en: The students were being tested all morning.
examples.zh: 學生們整個早上都在被測驗。

gept.pattern: Passive: present perfect (現在完成式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態現在完成式。
gept.structure: 主詞 + has / have + been + 過去分詞

examples.en: The report has been finished.
examples.zh: 報告已經完成了。

examples.en: Many trees have been planted this year.
examples.zh: 今年已經種了很多樹。

gept.pattern: Passive: past perfect (過去完成式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態過去完成式。
gept.structure: 主詞 + had + been + 過去分詞

examples.en: The letter had been sent before I called.
examples.zh: 在我打電話之前，信已經被寄出了。

examples.en: The room had been cleaned before the guests arrived.
examples.zh: 客人到達前房間已經被打掃過了。

gept.pattern: Passive: future simple (未來簡單式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態未來簡單式。
gept.structure: 主詞 + will + be + 過去分詞

examples.en: The package will be delivered tomorrow.
examples.zh: 包裹明天會被送達。

examples.en: The results will be announced next week.
examples.zh: 結果下週會被公布。

gept.pattern: Passive with Modal Verbs (情態動詞被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動語態搭配情態動詞。
gept.structure: 主詞 + 情態動詞 + be + 過去分詞

examples.en: This problem must be solved immediately.
examples.zh: 這個問題必須立刻被解決。

examples.en: The work should be finished by Friday.
examples.zh: 這份工作應該在週五前完成。

gept.pattern: Passive Reporting: It Is Said That (被動報導句,泛指傳聞)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動式報導句型，傳達一般傳聞或意見。
gept.structure: It + is / was + 過去分詞 + that + 子句

examples.en: It is said that he is a millionaire.
examples.zh: 據說他是個百萬富翁。

examples.en: It was reported that the accident happened at noon.
examples.zh: 據報導意外發生在中午。

gept.pattern: Passive Reporting: She Is Said To (被動報導句,主詞開頭)
gept.meaning_zh: 以主詞開頭的被動報導句型。
gept.structure: 主詞 + is / was + 過去分詞 + to 不定詞

examples.en: She is said to be very talented.
examples.zh: 據說她非常有才華。

examples.en: He is believed to have left the country.
examples.zh: 據信他已經離開了這個國家。

gept.pattern: Get-Passive (Get 被動語態)
gept.meaning_zh: 以 get 取代 be 的被動，常用於口語且強調變化或意外。
gept.structure: 主詞 + get / got + 過去分詞

examples.en: They got married last summer.
examples.zh: 他們去年夏天結婚了。

examples.en: He got fired for being late too often.
examples.zh: 他因為太常遲到被開除了。

gept.pattern: Causative: Have Something Done (使役,請他人做某事)
gept.meaning_zh: 請他人為自己做某事，「使／讓某物被…」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + have + 受詞 + 過去分詞

examples.en: I had my hair cut yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天剪了頭髮。

examples.en: She had her car repaired last week.
examples.zh: 她上週把車送修了。

gept.pattern: Passive with Two Objects (雙賓動詞被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 雙賓動詞的被動式，可由人或物當主詞。
gept.structure: 間接受詞 + be + 過去分詞 + 直接受詞 (或 直接受詞 + be + 過去分詞 + to + 間接受詞)

examples.en: She was given a beautiful necklace.
examples.zh: 她被送了一條美麗的項鍊。

examples.en: A beautiful necklace was given to her.
examples.zh: 一條美麗的項鍊被送給她。

gept.pattern: Relative Pronoun: who (關係代名詞 who,指人作主詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來引導形容詞子句修飾「人」，並在子句中當主詞。
gept.structure: 先行詞(人) + who + 動詞 …

examples.en: The teacher who teaches us English is very kind.
examples.zh: 教我們英文的老師非常親切。

examples.en: I know a girl who can speak three languages.
examples.zh: 我認識一個會說三種語言的女孩。

gept.pattern: Relative Pronoun: whom (關係代名詞 whom,指人作受詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 指「人」並在子句中當受詞，較正式；口語常以 who 或省略代替。
gept.structure: 先行詞(人) + whom + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: The man whom you met yesterday is my uncle.
examples.zh: 你昨天遇到的那位男士是我叔叔。

examples.en: She is the friend whom I trust the most.
examples.zh: 她是我最信任的朋友。

gept.pattern: Relative Pronoun: whose (關係代名詞 whose,所有格)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示「某人/某物的」，用來連接擁有關係。
gept.structure: 先行詞 + whose + 名詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: I have a friend whose father is a doctor.
examples.zh: 我有一個朋友，他的父親是醫生。

examples.en: The dog whose tail is short belongs to Mary.
examples.zh: 那隻尾巴很短的狗是瑪莉的。

gept.pattern: Relative Pronoun: which (關係代名詞 which,指物或事)
gept.meaning_zh: 用來引導修飾「事物或動物」的形容詞子句。
gept.structure: 先行詞(物) + which + 動詞/主詞 …

examples.en: The book which is on the desk is mine.
examples.zh: 在書桌上的那本書是我的。

examples.en: I bought a phone which has a great camera.
examples.zh: 我買了一支相機很棒的手機。

gept.pattern: Relative Pronoun: that (關係代名詞 that,人或物皆可)
gept.meaning_zh: 可代替 who 或 which，常用於限定用法，前面不加逗號。
gept.structure: 先行詞 + that + 動詞/主詞 …

examples.en: This is the cake that I baked this morning.
examples.zh: 這是我今天早上烤的蛋糕。

examples.en: He is the boy that won the contest.
examples.zh: 他就是那位贏得比賽的男孩。

gept.pattern: Omitting Relative Pronoun (省略關係代名詞,作受詞時可省略)
gept.meaning_zh: 當關係代名詞在子句中作受詞時，可以直接省略。
gept.structure: 先行詞 + (that/which/whom 省略) + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: The movie I watched last night was boring.
examples.zh: 我昨晚看的那部電影很無聊。

examples.en: The person you called is not here.
examples.zh: 你打電話找的那個人不在這裡。

gept.pattern: Relative adverb: where (關係副詞 where,地點)
gept.meaning_zh: 修飾「地點」的先行詞，等同於 in/at/on which。
gept.structure: 地點先行詞 + where + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: This is the park where we first met.
examples.zh: 這就是我們初次相遇的公園。

examples.en: I love the café where they serve great coffee.
examples.zh: 我喜歡那家供應好咖啡的咖啡館。

gept.pattern: Relative adverb: when (關係副詞 when,時間)
gept.meaning_zh: 修飾「時間」的先行詞，等同於 in/on/at which。
gept.structure: 時間先行詞 + when + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: I will never forget the day when I graduated.
examples.zh: 我永遠不會忘記我畢業的那一天。

examples.en: Summer is the season when flowers bloom.
examples.zh: 夏天是花朵盛開的季節。

gept.pattern: Relative adverb: why (關係副詞 why,原因)
gept.meaning_zh: 修飾 reason 等「原因」名詞，等同於 for which。
gept.structure: the reason + why + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: That's the reason why she was late.
examples.zh: 那就是她遲到的原因。

examples.en: I don't know the reason why he left.
examples.zh: 我不知道他離開的原因。

gept.pattern: Restrictive vs non-restrictive clause (限定用法與非限定用法,有無逗號)
gept.meaning_zh: 非限定用法以逗號分隔，提供附加資訊；限定用法則是不可省略的關鍵訊息。
gept.structure: …, who/which …, … 對比 … who/which … 不加逗號

examples.en: My brother, who lives in Japan, is a doctor.
examples.zh: 我哥哥住在日本，他是醫生。

examples.en: The student who studies hard will succeed.
examples.zh: 用功讀書的學生會成功。

gept.pattern: That not allowed in non-restrictive clause (非限定用法不可用 that)
gept.meaning_zh: 在加逗號的非限定形容詞子句中，不可用 that 取代 who/which。
gept.structure: …, who/which …(不可用 that)

examples.en: My laptop, which I bought last year, is broken.
examples.zh: 我去年買的筆電壞了。

examples.en: Mr. Lin, who teaches math, is retiring.
examples.zh: 教數學的林老師快退休了。

gept.pattern: Participle phrase reducing adjective clause: active V-ing (分詞片語簡化形容詞子句,主動 V-ing)
gept.meaning_zh: 省略關係代名詞與 be 動詞，主動意義用 V-ing。
gept.structure: 先行詞 + V-ing 片語 …

examples.en: The man standing over there is my father.
examples.zh: 站在那邊的那個人是我父親。

examples.en: Children playing in the yard look happy.
examples.zh: 在院子裡玩耍的孩子們看起來很開心。

gept.pattern: Participle phrase reducing adjective clause: passive V-pp (分詞片語簡化形容詞子句,被動 V-p.p.)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動意義時，省略關係代名詞與 be 後直接用過去分詞。
gept.structure: 先行詞 + V-p.p. 片語 …

examples.en: The letter written in French is hard to read.
examples.zh: 那封用法文寫的信很難讀。

examples.en: The window broken yesterday has been fixed.
examples.zh: 昨天被打破的窗戶已經修好了。

gept.pattern: Preposition + whom / which (介系詞加 whom / which)
gept.meaning_zh: 正式用法中，介系詞可置於 whom/which 之前。
gept.structure: 介系詞 + whom/which + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: The man with whom I spoke is a professor.
examples.zh: 和我說話的那位男士是教授。

examples.en: This is the tool with which he fixed the car.
examples.zh: 這就是他用來修車的工具。

gept.pattern: Quantifier + of which / whom (量詞加 of which / whom)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 some/many/none/all 等量詞接 of which/whom 帶出補充資訊。
gept.structure: …, some/many/none/all of which/whom + 動詞 …

examples.en: He has many books, some of which are very old.
examples.zh: 他有許多書，其中一些非常古老。

examples.en: I met three girls, none of whom I knew.
examples.zh: 我遇到三個女孩，沒有一個是我認識的。

gept.pattern: Gerund as subject (動名詞當主詞)
gept.meaning_zh: V-ing 可當句子主詞，視為單數。
gept.structure: V-ing + 單數動詞 …

examples.en: Swimming is good for your health.
examples.zh: 游泳對你的健康有益。

examples.en: Learning English takes time.
examples.zh: 學英文需要時間。

gept.pattern: Gerund as object (動名詞當受詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 某些動詞後必須接 V-ing 當受詞。
gept.structure: 主詞 + 動詞 + V-ing …

examples.en: I enjoy reading novels.
examples.zh: 我喜歡讀小說。

examples.en: She finished writing the report.
examples.zh: 她寫完了報告。

gept.pattern: Gerund after preposition (動名詞置於介系詞後)
gept.meaning_zh: 介系詞後若接動詞，必須改為 V-ing。
gept.structure: 介系詞 + V-ing …

examples.en: He is good at playing the piano.
examples.zh: 他很擅長彈鋼琴。

examples.en: Thank you for helping me.
examples.zh: 謝謝你幫助我。

gept.pattern: Verbs followed by gerund: enjoy, finish, mind, avoid, suggest (接動名詞的動詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 這些動詞之後只能接 V-ing。
gept.structure: enjoy / finish / mind / avoid / suggest + V-ing

examples.en: Would you mind opening the window?
examples.zh: 你介意打開窗戶嗎？

examples.en: He avoided answering my question.
examples.zh: 他避免回答我的問題。

gept.pattern: Verbs followed by infinitive: want, decide, hope, plan (接不定詞的動詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 這些動詞之後只能接 to V。
gept.structure: want / decide / hope / plan + to V

examples.en: I want to learn French.
examples.zh: 我想學法文。

examples.en: They decided to move abroad.
examples.zh: 他們決定搬到國外。

gept.pattern: Remember / forget + V-ing vs to V (remember / forget 接動名詞與不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: remember/forget ＋ V-ing 指「記得做過/忘了做過」；＋ to V 指「記得/忘了要去做」。
gept.structure: remember/forget + V-ing(已做過)/to V(尚未做)

examples.en: I remember meeting her last year.
examples.zh: 我記得去年見過她。

examples.en: Remember to lock the door before you leave.
examples.zh: 離開前記得鎖門。

gept.pattern: Stop + V-ing vs to V (stop 接動名詞與不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: stop ＋ V-ing「停止做某事」；stop to V「停下來去做另一件事」。
gept.structure: stop + V-ing/to V

examples.en: He stopped smoking last year.
examples.zh: 他去年戒菸了。

examples.en: We stopped to take some photos.
examples.zh: 我們停下來拍了一些照片。

gept.pattern: Try + V-ing vs to V (try 接動名詞與不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: try ＋ V-ing「試試看某方法」；try to V「努力嘗試去做」。
gept.structure: try + V-ing/to V

examples.en: Try opening the window for some fresh air.
examples.zh: 試試打開窗戶通通風。

examples.en: She tried to finish the work on time.
examples.zh: 她努力試著準時完成工作。

gept.pattern: Regret + V-ing vs to V (regret 接動名詞與不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: regret ＋ V-ing「後悔做過」；regret to V「遺憾地告知」。
gept.structure: regret + V-ing/to V

examples.en: I regret telling him the truth.
examples.zh: 我後悔告訴他真相。

examples.en: We regret to inform you that your application failed.
examples.zh: 很遺憾通知您，您的申請未通過。

gept.pattern: Perfect gerund: having + V-pp (完成動名詞 having 加過去分詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示動名詞動作發生在主要動詞之前。
gept.structure: having + V-p.p.

examples.en: He denied having stolen the money.
examples.zh: 他否認偷過那筆錢。

examples.en: She apologized for having forgotten my birthday.
examples.zh: 她為忘了我的生日而道歉。

gept.pattern: Perfect infinitive: to have + V-pp (完成不定詞 to have 加過去分詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示不定詞動作發生在主要動詞之前。
gept.structure: 主詞 + 動詞 + to have + V-p.p.

examples.en: He seems to have finished his homework.
examples.zh: 他似乎已經寫完功課了。

examples.en: She is glad to have met you.
examples.zh: 她很高興曾經見過你。

gept.pattern: Make / let + O + bare infinitive (使役動詞 make / let 加受詞加原形動詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 使役動詞 make/let 後接受詞與原形動詞。
gept.structure: make/let + O + V(原形)

examples.en: The teacher made us clean the classroom.
examples.zh: 老師要我們打掃教室。

examples.en: My mother let me go to the party.
examples.zh: 我媽讓我去參加派對。

gept.pattern: Help + O + (to) V (help 加受詞加帶或不帶 to 的不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: help 後可接帶 to 或不帶 to 的不定詞，意思相同。
gept.structure: help + O + (to)V

examples.en: She helped me carry the bags.
examples.zh: 她幫我提袋子。

examples.en: He helped his sister to do her homework.
examples.zh: 他幫他妹妹做功課。

gept.pattern: Modal verb + bare infinitive (情態動詞加原形動詞)
gept.meaning_zh: can/will/must/should 等情態動詞後接動詞原形。
gept.structure: 主詞 + 情態動詞 + V(原形)

examples.en: You should drink more water.
examples.zh: 你應該多喝水。

examples.en: He can swim very fast.
examples.zh: 他可以游得很快。

gept.pattern: Infinitive of purpose: to / in order to / so as to (不定詞表目的)
gept.meaning_zh: 以 to V、in order to、so as to 表「為了」。
gept.structure: 主詞 + 動詞 …, to / in order to / so as to V

examples.en: He studies hard in order to pass the exam.
examples.zh: 他用功讀書是為了通過考試。

examples.en: She got up early so as to catch the bus.
examples.zh: 她早起是為了趕公車。

gept.pattern: Adjective + infinitive (形容詞加不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 某些形容詞後接 to V 表示原因或評論。
gept.structure: 主詞 + be + 形容詞 + to V

examples.en: I am happy to help you.
examples.zh: 我很樂意幫你。

examples.en: This software is easy to use.
examples.zh: 這套軟體很容易使用。

gept.pattern: Too + adjective / adverb + to V (太……以致於不能……)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示「太……以致於不能……」。
gept.structure: too + adj./adv. + to V

examples.en: He is too young to drive.
examples.zh: 他太年輕了，不能開車。

examples.en: The box is too heavy to lift.
examples.zh: 這個箱子太重了，搬不動。

gept.pattern: Adjective / adverb + enough + to V (足夠……可以……)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示「足夠……可以……」，enough 置於形容詞或副詞之後。
gept.structure: adj./adv. + enough + to V

examples.en: She is old enough to vote.
examples.zh: 她年紀夠大可以投票了。

examples.en: He ran fast enough to win the race.
examples.zh: 他跑得夠快，足以贏得比賽。

gept.pattern: Causative have + O + bare infinitive (使役動詞 have 加受詞加原形動詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 主動使役：have ＋ 受詞 ＋ 動詞原形。
gept.structure: have + O + V(原形)

examples.en: I had the mechanic check my car.
examples.zh: 我請技師檢查我的車。

examples.en: She had her son clean his room.
examples.zh: 她要她兒子打掃房間。

gept.pattern: Causative have + O + V-pp (使役動詞 have 加受詞加過去分詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 被動使役：have ＋ 受詞 ＋ 過去分詞，表示「請人做某事」。
gept.structure: have + O + V-p.p.

examples.en: I had my hair cut yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天去剪了頭髮。

examples.en: She had her phone repaired.
examples.zh: 她把她的手機拿去修了。

gept.pattern: Causative get + O + to V / V-pp (使役動詞 get 加受詞加不定詞或過去分詞)
gept.meaning_zh: get 作使役時主動形式為 get ＋ O ＋ to V；被動為 get ＋ O ＋ V-p.p.。
gept.structure: get + O + to V/V-p.p.

examples.en: I got him to wash the dishes.
examples.zh: 我叫他去洗碗。

examples.en: She got her shoes cleaned.
examples.zh: 她把鞋子拿去清洗了。

gept.pattern: Comparative: -er / more (比較級 -er / more)
gept.meaning_zh: 單音節形容詞加 -er，多音節用 more，比較兩者用 than。
gept.structure: 主詞 + be + adj.-er / more adj. + than …

examples.en: My brother is taller than me.
examples.zh: 我哥哥比我高。

examples.en: This book is more interesting than that one.
examples.zh: 這本書比那本有趣。

gept.pattern: Superlative: -est / most (最高級 -est / most)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示三者以上中「最……」，前面通常加 the。
gept.structure: 主詞 + be + the + adj.-est / most adj. …

examples.en: He is the tallest boy in the class.
examples.zh: 他是班上最高的男生。

examples.en: This is the most exciting movie I've ever seen.
examples.zh: 這是我看過最刺激的電影。

gept.pattern: Less / least (less / least,程度較少)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示程度較少或最少。
gept.structure: less + adj. + than … / the least + adj. …

examples.en: This problem is less difficult than I thought.
examples.zh: 這個問題沒有我想得那麼難。

examples.en: He is the least talkative person in the group.
examples.zh: 他是這個團體中最不愛說話的人。

gept.pattern: As + adjective / adverb + as (同等比較)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示「和……一樣……」；否定為 not as/so ... as。
gept.structure: as + adj./adv. + as …

examples.en: She is as smart as her sister.
examples.zh: 她跟她姐姐一樣聰明。

examples.en: He doesn't run as fast as I do.
examples.zh: 他跑得沒有我快。

gept.pattern: The same + N + as (the same 加名詞加 as,相同)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示「和……相同」。
gept.structure: the same + 名詞 + as …

examples.en: I have the same bag as yours.
examples.zh: 我的包包跟你的一樣。

examples.en: She wears the same dress as her friend.
examples.zh: 她穿的洋裝跟她朋友一樣。

gept.pattern: The + comparative, the + comparative (越……就越……)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示「越……就越……」的平行結構。
gept.structure: The + 比較級 …, the + 比較級 …

examples.en: The more you practice, the better you get.
examples.zh: 你越練習就越進步。

examples.en: The harder he works, the more tired he feels.
examples.zh: 他越努力工作，就越感到疲倦。

gept.pattern: Comparative + and + comparative (越來越……)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示「越來越……」的漸進變化。
gept.structure: 主詞 + be / become + 比較級 + and + 比較級

examples.en: It is getting colder and colder.
examples.zh: 天氣變得越來越冷。

examples.en: She is becoming more and more confident.
examples.zh: 她變得越來越有自信。

gept.pattern: Reported speech: backshift of tense (間接引述,時態退一格)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述他人話語時，主要動詞為過去式，附屬子句的時態要往過去退一格。
gept.structure: 主詞 + said (that) + 主詞 + 過去式動詞 …

examples.en: He said that he was tired.
examples.zh: 他說他累了。

examples.en: She told me she had finished her homework.
examples.zh: 她告訴我她已經做完功課了。

gept.pattern: Reported speech: pronoun and time / place adverb changes (間接引述,人稱與時間地點副詞變化)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述時 today→that day、tomorrow→the next day、here→there 等需調整。
gept.structure: 主詞 + said (that) + 主詞 + 動詞 …(副詞替換)

examples.en: He said he would come the next day.
examples.zh: 他說他隔天會來。

examples.en: She said she had seen him there the day before.
examples.zh: 她說她前一天在那裡見過他。

gept.pattern: Reported question: yes / no with if / whether (間接問句,yes / no 問句以 if / whether 引導)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述 yes/no 問句時，用 if 或 whether 接陳述句語序。
gept.structure: 主詞 + asked + if/whether + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: He asked me if I was tired.
examples.zh: 他問我累不累。

examples.en: She asked whether I had finished the work.
examples.zh: 她問我有沒有做完工作。

gept.pattern: Reported question: wh- keeps question word (間接問句,wh- 問句保留疑問詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述 wh- 問句時保留疑問詞，並改為陳述句語序。
gept.structure: 主詞 + asked + 疑問詞 + 主詞 + 動詞 …

examples.en: She asked me where I lived.
examples.zh: 她問我住在哪裡。

examples.en: He asked what time the train would leave.
examples.zh: 他問火車幾點會開。

gept.pattern: Reported command: tell / ask + O + to V (間接命令,tell / ask 加受詞加不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述命令或請求時，用 tell/ask 加受詞與不定詞。
gept.structure: 主詞 + told/asked + O + (not)to V

examples.en: The teacher told us to be quiet.
examples.zh: 老師叫我們安靜。

examples.en: She asked me not to be late.
examples.zh: 她要我不要遲到。

gept.pattern: Reported suggestion: suggest + V-ing / that clause (間接建議,suggest 加動名詞或 that 子句)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述建議用 suggest 後接 V-ing 或 that 子句（that 子句中動詞用原形）。
gept.structure: suggest + V-ing / suggest that + S + (should) + V

examples.en: He suggested going to the beach.
examples.zh: 他建議去海邊。

examples.en: She suggested that we should leave early.
examples.zh: 她建議我們早點離開。

gept.pattern: Say vs tell (say 與 tell 的用法區別)
gept.meaning_zh: say 後直接接話語，不接間接受詞；tell 後必須接人作受詞。
gept.structure: say (to 某人) that … / tell 某人 that …

examples.en: He said that he was hungry.
examples.zh: 他說他餓了。

examples.en: She told me that she was happy.
examples.zh: 她告訴我她很開心。

gept.pattern: At + point of time (at 加時間點)
gept.meaning_zh: 用於確切的時間點（鐘點、節日時刻）
gept.structure: at + 鐘點時刻 / noon / night / weekend

examples.en: The meeting starts at 9 o'clock.
examples.zh: 會議在九點開始。

examples.en: I can't sleep at night.
examples.zh: 我晚上睡不著。

gept.pattern: On + date / day (on 加日期或星期)
gept.meaning_zh: 用於特定日子或星期幾
gept.structure: on + 星期 / 日期

examples.en: We have class on Monday.
examples.zh: 我們星期一有課。

examples.en: She was born on May 5th.
examples.zh: 她在五月五日出生。

gept.pattern: In + month / year / season (in 加月份年份或季節)
gept.meaning_zh: 用於較長的時間區段
gept.structure: in + 月份 / 年份 / 季節

examples.en: He moved to Taipei in 2020.
examples.zh: 他在二○二○年搬到台北。

examples.en: It often rains in spring.
examples.zh: 春天常下雨。

gept.pattern: By + time (by 加時間,之前)
gept.meaning_zh: 表示在某時間之前完成
gept.structure: by + 時間點

examples.en: Please finish the report by Friday.
examples.zh: 請在星期五前完成報告。

examples.en: I'll be home by ten.
examples.zh: 我十點前會到家。

gept.pattern: Since + starting time (since 加起點時間)
gept.meaning_zh: 從某時間點以來，常與完成式連用
gept.structure: since + 起點時間

examples.en: I have lived here since 2015.
examples.zh: 我從二○一五年起住在這裡。

examples.en: She hasn't called since Monday.
examples.zh: 她從星期一起就沒打來過。

gept.pattern: For + duration (for 加一段時間)
gept.meaning_zh: 持續一段時間
gept.structure: for + 一段時間

examples.en: We have been friends for ten years.
examples.zh: 我們當朋友已十年。

examples.en: He studied for three hours.
examples.zh: 他讀了三個小時。

gept.pattern: During + noun (during 加名詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 在某段期間之中
gept.structure: during + 名詞

examples.en: He fell asleep during the movie.
examples.zh: 他在電影放映中睡著了。

examples.en: I traveled during the summer.
examples.zh: 我在暑假期間旅行。

gept.pattern: At + place (at 加地點,小或點狀)
gept.meaning_zh: 在某個點狀位置
gept.structure: at + 特定點

examples.en: I'll meet you at the bus stop.
examples.zh: 我們在公車站碰面。

examples.en: She is waiting at the door.
examples.zh: 她在門口等。

gept.pattern: On + surface (on 加表面)
gept.meaning_zh: 在某個表面上
gept.structure: on + 表面

examples.en: The book is on the table.
examples.zh: 書在桌上。

examples.en: There's a fly on the wall.
examples.zh: 牆上有一隻蒼蠅。

gept.pattern: In + space (in 加空間內)
gept.meaning_zh: 在某個空間或容器內
gept.structure: in + 封閉空間

examples.en: The keys are in my bag.
examples.zh: 鑰匙在我的包包裡。

examples.en: He lives in Taipei.
examples.zh: 他住在台北。

gept.pattern: Between vs among (between 與 among)
gept.meaning_zh: between 用於兩者之間；among 用於三者或更多
gept.structure: between A and B / among + 複數

examples.en: Sit between your sister and me.
examples.zh: 坐在你妹妹和我之間。

examples.en: He is popular among his classmates.
examples.zh: 他在同學之中很受歡迎。

gept.pattern: To / from (方向,到與從)
gept.meaning_zh: 到／從
gept.structure: to / from + 地點

examples.en: She drove from Taipei to Kaohsiung.
examples.zh: 她從台北開車到高雄。

examples.en: I'm going to the library.
examples.zh: 我要去圖書館。

gept.pattern: Through / over / under (穿過 / 越過 / 在下方)
gept.meaning_zh: 穿過／越過／在下方
gept.structure: through / over / under + 名詞

examples.en: The train went through a tunnel.
examples.zh: 火車穿過了隧道。

examples.en: The ball flew over the fence.
examples.zh: 球飛過了圍籬。

gept.pattern: Because of / due to (由於,後接名詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 由於、因為（後接名詞）
gept.structure: because of / due to + 名詞

examples.en: The game was canceled because of the rain.
examples.zh: 比賽因雨取消。

examples.en: His success is due to hard work.
examples.zh: 他的成功歸因於努力。

gept.pattern: Depend / rely on (依靠,取決於)
gept.meaning_zh: 依靠、取決於
gept.structure: depend / rely on + 名詞

examples.en: Children depend on their parents.
examples.zh: 孩子依賴父母。

examples.en: You can rely on me.
examples.zh: 你可以信賴我。

gept.pattern: Consist of (由……組成)
gept.meaning_zh: 由……組成
gept.structure: consist of + 名詞

examples.en: The team consists of ten players.
examples.zh: 這支隊伍由十名球員組成。

examples.en: Water consists of hydrogen and oxygen.
examples.zh: 水由氫和氧組成。

gept.pattern: Accuse / suspect of (指控或懷疑某人)
gept.meaning_zh: 指控／懷疑某人……
gept.structure: accuse / suspect 某人 of + 名詞/V-ing

examples.en: They accused him of lying.
examples.zh: 他們指控他說謊。

examples.en: The police suspected her of theft.
examples.zh: 警方懷疑她偷竊。

gept.pattern: Afraid of / interested in (形容詞加介系詞固定搭配)
gept.meaning_zh: 形容詞＋介系詞固定搭配
gept.structure: adj. + 介系詞 + 名詞/V-ing

examples.en: She is afraid of spiders.
examples.zh: 她怕蜘蛛。

examples.en: I'm interested in music.
examples.zh: 我對音樂有興趣。

gept.pattern: Phrasal verb: separable (片語動詞,可分離)
gept.meaning_zh: 可分離片語動詞，受詞為代名詞時必置中
gept.structure: V + 代名詞 + 介副詞

examples.en: Please turn it off.
examples.zh: 請把它關掉。

examples.en: She picked up the book / picked the book up.
examples.zh: 她把書撿起來。

gept.pattern: Phrasal verb: inseparable (片語動詞,不可分離)
gept.meaning_zh: 不可分離片語動詞，受詞必置最後
gept.structure: V + 介副詞 + 受詞

examples.en: I look after my brother.
examples.zh: 我照顧我弟弟。

examples.en: We ran into an old friend.
examples.zh: 我們巧遇了一位老朋友。

gept.pattern: The: definite article (定冠詞 the,特指唯一)
gept.meaning_zh: 定冠詞，用於特定、唯一或第二次提及
gept.structure: the + 名詞

examples.en: The sun rises in the east.
examples.zh: 太陽從東方升起。

examples.en: I read a book; the book was great.
examples.zh: 我看了一本書，那本書很棒。

gept.pattern: A / an: first mention (不定冠詞 a / an,第一次提及)
gept.meaning_zh: 不定冠詞，首次提及或一個（任一）
gept.structure: a + 子音音 / an + 母音音

examples.en: I saw a dog and an elephant.
examples.zh: 我看到一隻狗和一頭大象。

examples.en: He is a doctor.
examples.zh: 他是醫生。

gept.pattern: Zero article: plural generic (零冠詞,複數泛指)
gept.meaning_zh: 複數名詞作泛指、抽象名詞不加冠詞
gept.structure: Ø + 複數 / 抽象名詞

examples.en: Dogs are loyal animals.
examples.zh: 狗是忠誠的動物。

examples.en: Honesty is important.
examples.zh: 誠實很重要。

gept.pattern: Some / any (some 與 any)
gept.meaning_zh: some 用於肯定，any 用於否定／疑問
gept.structure: some / any + 名詞

examples.en: I have some money.
examples.zh: 我有一些錢。

examples.en: Do you have any questions?
examples.zh: 你有任何問題嗎？

gept.pattern: Few / a few / little / a little (數量詞 few / a few / little / a little)
gept.meaning_zh: 幾乎沒有／一些（few 可數、little 不可數）
gept.structure: few / a few + 複可 ; little / a little + 不可數

examples.en: I have a few friends here.
examples.zh: 我這裡有幾個朋友。

examples.en: There is little water in the bottle.
examples.zh: 瓶子裡幾乎沒水。

gept.pattern: FANBOYS: coordinating conjunctions (對等連接詞 FANBOYS)
gept.meaning_zh: for/and/nor/but/or/yet/so，連接對等的句子
gept.structure: S1 V1, FANBOYS S2 V2

examples.en: I was tired, so I went to bed.
examples.zh: 我累了，所以就睡了。

examples.en: He's young but very wise.
examples.zh: 他年輕但很有智慧。

gept.pattern: Because / since (因為,引導原因子句)
gept.meaning_zh: 因為，引導原因副詞子句
gept.structure: because / since + S + V

examples.en: I stayed home because I was sick.
examples.zh: 我留在家裡因為生病了。

examples.en: Since it's late, let's stop.
examples.zh: 既然晚了，我們停下吧。

gept.pattern: Although / though / even though (雖然,引導讓步子句)
gept.meaning_zh: 雖然，引導讓步副詞子句
gept.structure: although + S + V

examples.en: Although it rained, we went out.
examples.zh: 雖然下雨，我們還是出門。

examples.en: He smiled even though he was upset.
examples.zh: 他雖然難過卻面帶微笑。

gept.pattern: Unless (除非)
gept.meaning_zh: 除非＝if...not
gept.structure: unless + S + V (現在式)

examples.en: You'll be late unless you hurry.
examples.zh: 你不快點就會遲到。

examples.en: I won't go unless you come.
examples.zh: 除非你來，否則我不去。

gept.pattern: Both ... and (兩者都)
gept.meaning_zh: 兩者都，連接兩對等成分
gept.structure: both A and B

examples.en: She is both smart and kind.
examples.zh: 她既聰明又善良。

examples.en: Both my parents work.
examples.zh: 我父母都工作。

gept.pattern: Either ... or / neither ... nor (不是就是 / 既不也不)
gept.meaning_zh: 不是……就是／既不……也不
gept.structure: either A or B / neither A nor B

examples.en: You can have either tea or coffee.
examples.zh: 你可以選茶或咖啡。

examples.en: Neither John nor Mary came.
examples.zh: 約翰和瑪麗都沒來。

gept.pattern: Not only ... but also (不僅而且)
gept.meaning_zh: 不僅……而且……
gept.structure: not only A but also B

examples.en: He is not only handsome but also rich.
examples.zh: 他不僅帥而且有錢。

examples.en: She speaks not only English but also French.
examples.zh: 她不僅說英語也說法語。

gept.pattern: However / therefore / furthermore (連接副詞,然而 / 因此 / 再者)
gept.meaning_zh: 連接副詞：然而／因此／再者
gept.structure: S1 V1. However/Therefore, S2 V2.

examples.en: It was raining. However, we went hiking.
examples.zh: 當時下著雨，然而我們還是去爬山。

examples.en: He studied hard. Therefore, he passed.
examples.zh: 他用功讀書，所以通過了。

gept.pattern: Negative adverb inversion (否定副詞倒裝)
gept.meaning_zh: 否定副詞置句首，主詞與助動詞倒裝
gept.structure: Never/Rarely/Seldom/Hardly + 助動詞 + S + V

examples.en: Never have I seen such a sight.
examples.zh: 我從未見過這樣的景象。

examples.en: Rarely does he complain.
examples.zh: 他很少抱怨。

gept.pattern: No sooner ... than / hardly ... when (一……就……,句首倒裝)
gept.meaning_zh: 一……就……（句首倒裝）
gept.structure: No sooner had S Vpp than S2 V2 / Hardly had S Vpp when S2 V2

examples.en: No sooner had I sat down than the phone rang.
examples.zh: 我才剛坐下電話就響了。

examples.en: Hardly had he arrived when it started to rain.
examples.zh: 他才剛到就開始下雨。

gept.pattern: Only + adverbial inversion (Only 加副詞片語倒裝)
gept.meaning_zh: Only 開頭時主詞助動詞倒裝
gept.structure: Only then/if/when + 助動詞 + S + V

examples.en: Only then did I realize my mistake.
examples.zh: 那時我才意識到自己的錯誤。

examples.en: Only when he left did she cry.
examples.zh: 直到他離開她才哭。

gept.pattern: Conditional inversion: omitting if (條件句倒裝,省略 if)
gept.meaning_zh: 省略 if 將助動詞提至句首
gept.structure: Had/Were/Should + S + V...

examples.en: Had I known, I would have helped.
examples.zh: 早知道我就會幫忙。

examples.en: Were I you, I would apologize.
examples.zh: 如果我是你，我會道歉。

gept.pattern: It-cleft (It 強調句)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 It is/was...that/who 強調某成分
gept.structure: It is/was + 強調部分 + that/who + 其餘

examples.en: It was John who broke the window.
examples.zh: 是約翰打破了窗戶。

examples.en: It is honesty that matters most.
examples.zh: 最重要的是誠實。

gept.pattern: Wh-cleft: What emphasis (What 強調句)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 What 子句強調主詞或受詞
gept.structure: What + S + V + is/was + 強調部分

examples.en: What I need is some rest.
examples.zh: 我需要的是休息。

examples.en: What he wants is your support.
examples.zh: 他想要的是你的支持。

gept.pattern: Subject-verb agreement: collective noun (主詞動詞一致,集合名詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 集合名詞可單可複，視整體或個體而定
gept.structure: 集合名詞 + is/are

examples.en: My family is large.
examples.zh: 我家是大家庭。

examples.en: The team are arguing among themselves.
examples.zh: 隊員們彼此在爭吵。

gept.pattern: Neither / either of + plural (neither / either of 加複數)
gept.meaning_zh: neither/either of 後接複數名詞，動詞用單數
gept.structure: Neither/Either of + the + Ns + V(s)

examples.en: Neither of the answers is correct.
examples.zh: 兩個答案都不對。

examples.en: Either of you is welcome.
examples.zh: 你們任一位都歡迎。

gept.pattern: There is / there are (There 句型)
gept.meaning_zh: There 句型動詞需與後面名詞數一致
gept.structure: There is + 單 / There are + 複

examples.en: There is a cat on the sofa.
examples.zh: 沙發上有一隻貓。

examples.en: There are three books on the desk.
examples.zh: 桌上有三本書。

gept.pattern: Question tag (附加問句)
gept.meaning_zh: 前肯後否、前否後肯
gept.structure: 主句, 助動詞 + (n't) + 代名詞?

examples.en: You're a student, aren't you?
examples.zh: 你是學生，對吧？

examples.en: He doesn't drive, does he?
examples.zh: 他不開車，是吧？

gept.pattern: Emphatic do (強調的 do)
gept.meaning_zh: 在動詞前加 do/does/did 強調語氣
gept.structure: S + do/does/did + V(原形)

examples.en: I do believe you.
examples.zh: 我真的相信你。

examples.en: She did finish on time.
examples.zh: 她的確準時完成了。

gept.pattern: Adverb position: adverb of frequency (副詞位置,頻率副詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 頻率副詞置 be 動詞後、一般動詞前
gept.structure: S + (助動詞/be) + adv + V

examples.en: She always arrives early.
examples.zh: 她總是早到。

examples.en: He is never late.
examples.zh: 他從不遲到。

gept.pattern: Basic word order SVO (基本語序 SVO)
gept.meaning_zh: 英文基本句序：主詞＋動詞＋受詞
gept.structure: S + V + O

examples.en: I love music.
examples.zh: 我喜愛音樂。

examples.en: She wrote a letter.
examples.zh: 她寫了一封信。

gept.pattern: Order of cumulative adjectives (連續形容詞順序)
gept.meaning_zh: 多形容詞依大小／形狀／顏色／材料順序
gept.structure: 意見 + 大小 + 年齡 + 形狀 + 顏色 + 來源 + 材質 + N

examples.en: a beautiful small old round wooden table
examples.zh: 一張美麗、小巧、古老、圓形的木桌。

examples.en: a lovely big red box
examples.zh: 一個可愛的大紅盒子。

gept.pattern: Comma usage: listing (逗號用法,列舉)
gept.meaning_zh: 列舉三項以上時用逗號分隔
gept.structure: A, B, and C

examples.en: I bought apples, oranges, and bananas.
examples.zh: 我買了蘋果、橘子和香蕉。

examples.en: She is kind, smart, and funny.
examples.zh: 她善良、聰明又幽默。

gept.pattern: Quotation marks usage (引號用法)
gept.meaning_zh: 直接引述用引號，標點置引號內
gept.structure: S said, "..."

examples.en: She said, "I'll be back soon."
examples.zh: 她說：「我很快就回來。」

examples.en: He asked, "What time is it?"
examples.zh: 他問：「現在幾點？」

gept.pattern: Compound adjective hyphen (複合形容詞連字號)
gept.meaning_zh: 修飾名詞的複合形容詞用連字號
gept.structure: adj-N / N-V-ed + 名詞

examples.en: a well-known author
examples.zh: 一位知名作家。

examples.en: a five-year-old boy
examples.zh: 一個五歲的男孩。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: I wish + past (假設語氣,與現在事實相反的願望)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 I wish 加過去式表達對現在事實不滿或相反的願望。
gept.structure: S + wish + (that) + S + V-過去式 (與現在相反)

examples.en: I wish I had more free time on weekends.
examples.zh: 我真希望週末有多一點空閒時間。

examples.en: She wishes she lived closer to her office.
examples.zh: 她希望自己住得離辦公室近一點。

examples.en: I wish it weren't raining right now.
examples.zh: 我真希望現在沒在下雨。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: I wish + past perfect (假設語氣,與過去事實相反的後悔)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 I wish 加過去完成式表達對過去已發生的事感到後悔。
gept.structure: S + wish + (that) + S + had + V-p.p. (與過去相反)

examples.en: I wish I had studied harder for the exam.
examples.zh: 我真希望當初考試準備得更認真。

examples.en: He wishes he hadn't said those words.
examples.zh: 他真希望自己沒說過那些話。

examples.en: We wish we had booked the tickets earlier.
examples.zh: 我們真希望早點訂票。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: I wish + would (假設語氣,希望對方改變行為)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 I wish 加 would 表達希望某人或某事改變（常帶抱怨語氣）。
gept.structure: S + wish + (that) + S + would + V-原形

examples.en: I wish you would stop interrupting me.
examples.zh: 我真希望你別再打斷我了。

examples.en: She wishes her neighbors would be quieter at night.
examples.zh: 她希望鄰居晚上能安靜一點。

examples.en: I wish it would stop snowing.
examples.zh: 我真希望雪能停下來。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: if only (假設語氣,但願)
gept.meaning_zh: If only 與 I wish 同義但語氣更強烈，表達強烈的願望或遺憾。
gept.structure: If only + S + V-過去式 / had + V-p.p.

examples.en: If only I knew the answer to this question.
examples.zh: 要是我知道這題的答案就好了。

examples.en: If only we had left the house ten minutes earlier.
examples.zh: 要是我們早十分鐘出門就好了。

examples.en: If only I could speak French fluently.
examples.zh: 要是我能說一口流利的法文就好了。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: as if / as though (假設語氣,彷彿)
gept.meaning_zh: as if / as though 加過去式表達與事實相反的「彷彿、好像」。
gept.structure: S + V + as if / as though + S + V-過去式 (與現在相反)

examples.en: He talks as if he knew everything about cars.
examples.zh: 他講起話來彷彿什麼車的事都懂。

examples.en: She treats me as though I were a child.
examples.zh: 她對待我彷彿我是個小孩。

examples.en: They spend money as if they were millionaires.
examples.zh: 他們花錢彷彿自己是百萬富翁。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: would rather (假設語氣,寧願某人做某事)
gept.meaning_zh: would rather 後接另一主詞加過去式，表達寧願某人做或不做某事。
gept.structure: S + would rather + (that) + S + V-過去式

examples.en: I would rather you didn't smoke in the house.
examples.zh: 我寧願你別在屋裡抽菸。

examples.en: She'd rather we paid in cash.
examples.zh: 她比較希望我們用現金付款。

examples.en: I'd rather you came tomorrow instead of today.
examples.zh: 我寧願你明天來而不是今天。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: it's (high) time (假設語氣,早該做某事)
gept.meaning_zh: It's time 後接主詞加過去式，表達某事早該發生卻還沒做。
gept.structure: It's (high / about) time + S + V-過去式

examples.en: It's time we left, or we'll miss the bus.
examples.zh: 我們該走了，不然會錯過公車。

examples.en: It's high time you found a steady job.
examples.zh: 你早該找份穩定的工作了。

examples.en: It's about time they fixed the broken elevator.
examples.zh: 他們早該修好那台壞掉的電梯了。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: suggest / insist + (should) (假設語氣,建議堅持後接原形)
gept.meaning_zh: suggest、insist、demand、recommend 等動詞後的 that 子句用原形動詞（should 可省略）。
gept.structure: S + suggest / insist / demand + that + S + (should) + V-原形

examples.en: The doctor suggested that he take a few days off.
examples.zh: 醫生建議他休假幾天。

examples.en: She insisted that the meeting be postponed.
examples.zh: 她堅持會議要延期。

examples.en: I recommend that everyone arrive ten minutes early.
examples.zh: 我建議大家提早十分鐘到。

gept.pattern: Subjunctive: it is essential / important + (should) (假設語氣,重要必要形容詞後接原形)
gept.meaning_zh: It is essential / important / necessary 等形容詞後的 that 子句用原形動詞。
gept.structure: It is essential / important / necessary + that + S + (should) + V-原形

examples.en: It is essential that every passenger wear a seatbelt.
examples.zh: 每位乘客都必須繫上安全帶。

examples.en: It is important that she be informed immediately.
examples.zh: 必須立刻通知她這件事。

examples.en: It is necessary that we keep the receipts.
examples.zh: 我們有必要保留收據。

gept.pattern: Future in the past: was / were going to (過去看未來,原本打算)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 was/were going to 表達過去某時間點原本打算做、但未必實現的事。
gept.structure: S + was / were + going to + V-原形 (過去視角的未來)

examples.en: I was going to call you, but my phone died.
examples.zh: 我本來要打給你，但手機沒電了。

examples.en: We were going to eat out, then it started raining.
examples.zh: 我們本來要出去吃，後來開始下雨了。

examples.en: She was going to apologize, but he left first.
examples.zh: 她本來想道歉，但他先離開了。

gept.pattern: Future in the past: would (過去看未來,當時的未來)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 would 從過去的角度敘述後來發生的事，常見於敘事或轉述。
gept.structure: S + would + V-原形 (從過去看後來發生的事)

examples.en: He had no idea that he would win the contest that day.
examples.zh: 他當時完全不知道那天自己會贏得比賽。

examples.en: She left home at eighteen and would not return for years.
examples.zh: 她十八歲離家，往後多年都沒有回去。

examples.en: Little did they know the trip would change their lives.
examples.zh: 他們當時根本不知道這趟旅行會改變他們的一生。

gept.pattern: Future perfect continuous in context (未來完成進行式,強調持續時長)
gept.meaning_zh: 未來完成進行式強調到未來某時點為止，動作已持續的一段時間長度。
gept.structure: S + will have been + V-ing + for + 時間 (未來某時前的持續)

examples.en: By next month, I will have been working here for ten years.
examples.zh: 到下個月，我在這裡就工作滿十年了。

examples.en: By the time you arrive, we will have been waiting for two hours.
examples.zh: 等你到的時候，我們就已經等了兩個小時了。

examples.en: In June, they will have been dating for five years.
examples.zh: 到六月，他們交往就滿五年了。

gept.pattern: Modal: may / might as well (助動詞,不妨,反正也沒更好選擇)
gept.meaning_zh: may / might as well 表達「反正沒更好選擇，不妨就做」。
gept.structure: S + may / might as well + V-原形

examples.en: We've missed the train, so we might as well grab a coffee.
examples.zh: 我們已經錯過火車了，不妨去喝杯咖啡。

examples.en: No one else wants it, so you may as well take it.
examples.zh: 沒別人想要，你不妨就拿走吧。

examples.en: It's already late; we might as well stay home tonight.
examples.zh: 已經很晚了，我們今晚不妨待在家。

gept.pattern: Modal: would rather ... than (助動詞,寧願而不願)
gept.meaning_zh: would rather A than B 表達在兩者之間寧願選 A，後接原形動詞。
gept.structure: S + would rather + V-原形 + than + V-原形

examples.en: I would rather walk than wait for the bus.
examples.zh: 我寧願走路也不想等公車。

examples.en: She'd rather stay in than go to a crowded party.
examples.zh: 她寧願待在家也不想去人擠人的派對。

examples.en: He would rather tell the truth than make up an excuse.
examples.zh: 他寧願說實話也不願編藉口。

gept.pattern: Modal: would have to (助動詞,假設情況下的必要)
gept.meaning_zh: would have to 表達在某個假設情況下「就必須」做某事。
gept.structure: S + would have to + V-原形 (假設下的必要)

examples.en: If we moved abroad, the kids would have to change schools.
examples.zh: 如果我們搬到國外，孩子們就得轉學。

examples.en: To get that job, you would have to learn German.
examples.zh: 要得到那份工作，你就得學德文。

examples.en: Without a car, she would have to take two buses to work.
examples.zh: 沒有車的話，她上班就得轉兩班公車。

gept.pattern: Modal: can't have + p.p. (助動詞,過去不可能推測)
gept.meaning_zh: can't / couldn't have + p.p. 表達對過去事件「不可能發生」的推測。
gept.structure: S + can't / couldn't have + V-p.p. (過去否定推測)

examples.en: She can't have finished the whole book in one night.
examples.zh: 她不可能一個晚上就讀完整本書。

examples.en: He couldn't have stolen the money; he was with me.
examples.zh: 他不可能偷了錢，他當時和我在一起。

examples.en: They can't have left already; their car is still here.
examples.zh: 他們不可能已經走了，他們的車還在這裡。

gept.pattern: Modal: needn't have + p.p. (助動詞,過去其實不必做卻做了)
gept.meaning_zh: needn't have + p.p. 表達過去做了某件其實不必做的事。
gept.structure: S + needn't have + V-p.p. (做了但不必要)

examples.en: You needn't have cooked so much; we're not that hungry.
examples.zh: 你其實不必煮這麼多，我們沒那麼餓。

examples.en: She needn't have worried; the test was easy.
examples.zh: 她根本不必擔心，那場考試很簡單。

examples.en: We needn't have rushed; the train was delayed anyway.
examples.zh: 我們根本不必趕，火車反正誤點了。

gept.pattern: Modal: didn't need to vs needn't have (助動詞,不必做的兩種差異)
gept.meaning_zh: didn't need to 表示不必做且通常沒做；needn't have + p.p. 表示做了卻沒必要。
gept.structure: S + didn't need to + V-原形 (沒做) / needn't have + V-p.p. (做了)

examples.en: I didn't need to buy milk, so I saved the money.
examples.zh: 我不必買牛奶，所以省下了錢（沒買）。

examples.en: I needn't have bought milk; there was plenty at home.
examples.zh: 我其實不必買牛奶，家裡明明還很多（買了）。

examples.en: She didn't need to take a taxi because her friend drove her.
examples.zh: 她不必搭計程車，因為朋友載了她（沒搭）。

gept.pattern: Modal: would have + p.p. (助動詞,過去假設的結果)
gept.meaning_zh: would have + p.p. 表達在過去某假設條件下「本來會」發生的結果。
gept.structure: S + would have + V-p.p. (過去假設的結果)

examples.en: I would have helped you if you had asked.
examples.zh: 你要是開口，我本來會幫你的。

examples.en: She would have come, but she was feeling sick.
examples.zh: 她本來會來的，但她身體不舒服。

examples.en: We would have won the game with a bit more luck.
examples.zh: 再多一點運氣，我們本來會贏的。

gept.pattern: Modal: dare / dare not (助動詞,膽敢)
gept.meaning_zh: dare 作助動詞時表「膽敢」，常用於否定與疑問。
gept.structure: S + dare (not) + V-原形 / How dare + S + V-原形

examples.en: How dare you speak to your mother like that!
examples.zh: 你竟敢這樣對你媽媽說話！

examples.en: He dared not tell his boss the truth.
examples.zh: 他不敢告訴老闆實情。

examples.en: I daren't look down from such a high place.
examples.zh: 我不敢從這麼高的地方往下看。

gept.pattern: Passive: perfect infinitive (被動語態,完成不定詞被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 完成不定詞的被動形 to have been + p.p.，表達比主要動詞更早發生的被動動作。
gept.structure: to have been + V-p.p. (被動且更早發生)

examples.en: She seems to have been promoted recently.
examples.zh: 她似乎最近被升職了。

examples.en: The painting appears to have been damaged during the move.
examples.zh: 那幅畫似乎在搬運過程中被損壞了。

examples.en: He is believed to have been chosen for the role.
examples.zh: 據信他已獲選擔任這個角色。

gept.pattern: Passive: continuous infinitive vs gerund (被動語態,動名詞被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 動名詞的被動形 being + p.p.，用於介系詞後或當主詞、受詞。
gept.structure: being + V-p.p. (動名詞被動)

examples.en: Nobody likes being criticized in public.
examples.zh: 沒人喜歡在公開場合被批評。

examples.en: She remembers being given a toy train as a child.
examples.zh: 她記得小時候被送過一台玩具火車。

examples.en: Being chosen for the team was a great honor.
examples.zh: 獲選進入隊伍是莫大的榮幸。

gept.pattern: Passive: future perfect (被動語態,未來完成式被動)
gept.meaning_zh: 未來完成式的被動形 will have been + p.p.，表到未來某時將已被完成。
gept.structure: S + will have been + V-p.p. (未來完成被動)

examples.en: By Friday, all the reports will have been submitted.
examples.zh: 到星期五，所有報告都將已繳交。

examples.en: The bridge will have been completed by next spring.
examples.zh: 這座橋到明年春天就會完工了。

examples.en: By tonight, the rooms will have been cleaned.
examples.zh: 到今晚，房間都將已清掃完畢。

gept.pattern: Passive: need + V-ing (被動語態,need 接動名詞表被動)
gept.meaning_zh: need / want / require 後接動名詞具被動意義，等於 need to be + p.p.。
gept.structure: S + need / want + V-ing (= need to be + V-p.p.)

examples.en: The windows need cleaning before the guests arrive.
examples.zh: 客人來之前窗戶需要清洗。

examples.en: Your shoes want polishing for the interview.
examples.zh: 你的鞋子面試前該擦一擦了。

examples.en: This old wooden fence needs repainting.
examples.zh: 這道舊木籬笆需要重新上漆。

gept.pattern: Passive: causative get someone to (被動使役,get sb to do)
gept.meaning_zh: get someone to do 表設法讓某人做某事，與 have someone do 語氣不同（含說服、努力）。
gept.structure: S + get + O(人) + to + V-原形

examples.en: I finally got my brother to help me move the sofa.
examples.zh: 我終於說動我哥幫我搬沙發。

examples.en: She got the kids to tidy their rooms before dinner.
examples.zh: 她讓孩子們在晚餐前整理好房間。

examples.en: How did you get him to change his mind?
examples.zh: 你是怎麼讓他改變心意的？

gept.pattern: Reported speech: reporting verbs + to V (轉述句,轉述動詞接不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 許多轉述動詞如 offer、promise、refuse、agree、decide 後接不定詞。
gept.structure: S + offer / promise / refuse / agree + to + V-原形

examples.en: He promised to pay me back by Friday.
examples.zh: 他答應星期五前還我錢。

examples.en: She refused to answer any more questions.
examples.zh: 她拒絕再回答任何問題。

examples.en: They agreed to meet at the station at noon.
examples.zh: 他們同意中午在車站碰面。

gept.pattern: Reported speech: reporting verbs + sb + to V (轉述句,接受詞加不定詞)
gept.meaning_zh: advise、warn、remind、encourage、order 等轉述動詞後接受詞加不定詞。
gept.structure: S + advise / warn / remind + O(人) + to + V-原形

examples.en: The teacher advised us to read the instructions carefully.
examples.zh: 老師建議我們仔細閱讀說明。

examples.en: She warned him not to touch the hot stove.
examples.zh: 她警告他別碰那個燙的爐子。

examples.en: I reminded my sister to lock the front door.
examples.zh: 我提醒我妹妹要鎖前門。

gept.pattern: Reported speech: reporting verbs + V-ing (轉述句,轉述動詞接動名詞)
gept.meaning_zh: admit、deny、suggest、recommend、apologize for 等轉述動詞後接動名詞。
gept.structure: S + admit / deny / suggest + V-ing

examples.en: He admitted breaking the window during the game.
examples.zh: 他承認比賽時打破了窗戶。

examples.en: She denied taking the missing files.
examples.zh: 她否認拿走了那些不見的檔案。

examples.en: They suggested meeting again next week.
examples.zh: 他們建議下週再見一次面。

gept.pattern: Reported speech: this / here to that / there (轉述句,指示詞與地點副詞轉換)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述時近指詞與地方副詞通常改為遠指：this→that、here→there。
gept.structure: this → that / these → those / here → there (轉述時轉換)

examples.en: She said she didn't want that book anymore.
examples.zh: 她說她不再想要那本書了。

examples.en: He told me he had been waiting there all morning.
examples.zh: 他告訴我他在那裡等了一整個早上。

examples.en: They said those seats were already taken.
examples.zh: 他們說那些位子已經有人坐了。

gept.pattern: Reported speech: reporting questions word order (轉述問句,恢復直述語序)
gept.meaning_zh: 轉述問句時須恢復「主詞＋動詞」的直述語序，且不用問號與助動詞 do。
gept.structure: S + asked + (if / wh-) + S + V (直述語序)

examples.en: She asked where I had parked the car.
examples.zh: 她問我把車停在哪裡了。

examples.en: He asked whether the shop was still open.
examples.zh: 他問那家店是否還在營業。

examples.en: They asked how long the journey would take.
examples.zh: 他們問這趟路程要花多久。

gept.pattern: Conditional: implied / otherwise conditional (條件句,隱含條件 otherwise)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 otherwise / or 隱含一個條件，表達「否則就會…」的假設結果。
gept.structure: 祈使句 / 直述句, otherwise + S + would / will + V

examples.en: Write down the address; otherwise you'll forget it.
examples.zh: 把地址記下來，不然你會忘記。

examples.en: She left early, otherwise she would have missed the flight.
examples.zh: 她提早出發了，否則就會錯過班機。

examples.en: Hurry up, or we'll be late for the movie.
examples.zh: 快點，不然我們看電影會遲到。

gept.pattern: Conditional: if it weren't for / had it not been for (條件句,要不是因為)
gept.meaning_zh: If it weren't for（現在）/ If it hadn't been for（過去）表「要不是因為某事」。
gept.structure: If it weren't for + N / If it hadn't been for + N, S + would (have)...

examples.en: If it weren't for your help, I would be completely lost.
examples.zh: 要不是有你的幫忙，我會完全不知所措。

examples.en: If it hadn't been for the rain, we would have finished the hike.
examples.zh: 要不是因為那場雨，我們本來能走完那段山路。

examples.en: If it weren't for coffee, I couldn't get through Mondays.
examples.zh: 要不是有咖啡，我熬不過星期一。

gept.pattern: Conditional: but for + N (條件句,要不是 but for)
gept.meaning_zh: but for + 名詞是 if it weren't/hadn't been for 的正式簡化說法，表「要不是」。
gept.structure: But for + N, S + would (have) + V

examples.en: But for your advice, I would have made a serious mistake.
examples.zh: 要不是你的建議，我本來會犯下嚴重的錯誤。

examples.en: But for the traffic, we would have arrived on time.
examples.zh: 要不是塞車，我們本來會準時到。

examples.en: But for his quick thinking, the accident could have been worse.
examples.zh: 要不是他反應快，那場意外可能會更嚴重。

gept.pattern: Conditional: in case (條件句,以防萬一)
gept.meaning_zh: in case 表「以防萬一」，子句用現在式，動作是預防性的而非條件成立才做。
gept.structure: S + V, in case + S + V-現在式

examples.en: Take an umbrella in case it rains later.
examples.zh: 帶把傘，以防等一下下雨。

examples.en: I'll write down his number in case I lose my phone.
examples.zh: 我會把他的號碼記下來，以防手機弄丟。

examples.en: She keeps some cash in case the card machine breaks.
examples.zh: 她會留一些現金，以防刷卡機壞掉。

gept.pattern: Conditional: even if (條件句,即使)
gept.meaning_zh: even if 表「即使、就算」，強調條件成立也不改變結果。
gept.structure: Even if + S + V, S + V

examples.en: Even if it rains, we'll still go to the beach.
examples.zh: 就算下雨，我們還是會去海邊。

examples.en: Even if you apologize, he may not forgive you.
examples.zh: 就算你道歉，他也未必會原諒你。

examples.en: I wouldn't sell the house even if they offered double.
examples.zh: 就算他們出兩倍的價，我也不會賣這房子。

gept.pattern: Conditional: on condition that / as long as (條件句,以…為條件)
gept.meaning_zh: on condition that 與 as long as / provided 同義，表「只要、條件是」。
gept.structure: S + V + on condition that + S + V-現在式

examples.en: You can borrow my car on condition that you fill the tank.
examples.zh: 你可以借我的車，條件是要加滿油。

examples.en: They'll lend us the money on condition that we pay it back soon.
examples.zh: 他們願意借我們錢，條件是要盡快歸還。

examples.en: I'll help you on condition that you keep it a secret.
examples.zh: 我會幫你，但條件是你要保密。

gept.pattern: Conditional: continuous in conditionals (條件句,進行式條件)
gept.meaning_zh: 條件句中可用進行式，描述假設情況下正在進行的動作或結果。
gept.structure: If + S + were + V-ing, S + would be + V-ing

examples.en: If the sun were shining, we would be sitting in the garden.
examples.zh: 如果出太陽，我們現在就會坐在花園裡了。

examples.en: If I were on holiday now, I would be lying on a beach.
examples.zh: 如果我現在在度假，就會躺在海灘上了。

examples.en: If it weren't snowing, the children would be playing outside.
examples.zh: 如果沒在下雪，孩子們就會在外面玩了。

gept.pattern: Tense: present perfect with superlatives (現在完成式,最高級結構)
gept.meaning_zh: 最高級或序數後常用現在完成式，表「至今為止…過最…的」。
gept.structure: This is the + 最高級 + N + (that) + S + have ever + V-p.p.

examples.en: This is the best meal I have ever eaten.
examples.zh: 這是我吃過最棒的一餐。

examples.en: That was the most boring film I have ever seen.
examples.zh: 那是我看過最無聊的電影。

examples.en: She's the kindest person I've ever met.
examples.zh: 她是我見過最善良的人。

gept.pattern: Tense: it / this is the first time + present perfect (現在完成式,第一次做某事)
gept.meaning_zh: It's the first / second time 後常接現在完成式，表「第幾次做某事」。
gept.structure: It's the first / second time + (that) + S + have + V-p.p.

examples.en: It's the first time I have tried Thai food.
examples.zh: 這是我第一次嘗試泰國料理。

examples.en: This is the third time he has called today.
examples.zh: 這已經是他今天第三次打來了。

examples.en: It's the first time she has flown alone.
examples.zh: 這是她第一次獨自搭飛機。

gept.pattern: Tense: past perfect with before / after (過去完成式,前後順序連接詞)
gept.meaning_zh: 用 before / after 加過去完成式，明確點出兩個過去動作的先後順序。
gept.structure: S + had + V-p.p. + before + S + V-過去式

examples.en: The train had already left before we reached the platform.
examples.zh: 我們到月台之前火車就已經開走了。

examples.en: After she had finished her homework, she went out to play.
examples.zh: 她寫完功課後就出去玩了。

examples.en: He had never seen the ocean before he moved to the coast.
examples.zh: 在搬到海邊之前他從沒見過大海。

gept.pattern: Tense: present perfect continuous vs present perfect (完成進行式 vs 完成式對比)
gept.meaning_zh: 完成進行式強調動作持續與過程，完成式強調完成與結果。
gept.structure: have been + V-ing (持續/過程) vs have + V-p.p. (完成/結果)

examples.en: I have been painting the fence, so my hands are dirty.
examples.zh: 我一直在漆籬笆，所以手很髒（強調過程）。

examples.en: I have painted the fence, so it looks brand new.
examples.zh: 我把籬笆漆好了，看起來煥然一新（強調結果）。

examples.en: She has been reading all afternoon but hasn't finished the book.
examples.zh: 她讀了一整個下午，但還沒讀完那本書。

gept.pattern: Tense: when + past simple vs past perfect (when 子句,過去式與過去完成式對比)
gept.meaning_zh: when 子句用過去式表「之後才」，用過去完成式表「之前已」，先後關係不同。
gept.structure: When + S + V-過去式 vs When + S + had + V-p.p.

examples.en: When I arrived, the party started.
examples.zh: 我到的時候，派對才開始（幾乎同時）。

examples.en: When I arrived, the party had started.
examples.zh: 我到的時候，派對已經開始了（之前就開始）。

examples.en: When she had washed the dishes, she sat down to rest.
examples.zh: 她洗完碗之後才坐下來休息。

gept.pattern: Tense: future continuous for polite inquiry (未來進行式,委婉詢問)
gept.meaning_zh: 未來進行式可用來委婉詢問對方計畫，語氣比 will 更不帶壓力。
gept.structure: Will + S + be + V-ing ...? (委婉詢問計畫)

examples.en: Will you be using the car this evening?
examples.zh: 你今晚會用到車嗎？

examples.en: Will you be joining us for dinner later?
examples.zh: 你等一下會跟我們一起吃晚餐嗎？

examples.en: Will you be passing by the post office today?
examples.zh: 你今天會經過郵局嗎？

gept.pattern: Tense: was about to when (過去式,正要做某事時)
gept.meaning_zh: was/were about to 加 when 子句，表「正要做某事時，另一件事發生了」。
gept.structure: S + was / were about to + V-原形 + when + S + V-過去式

examples.en: I was about to leave when the phone rang.
examples.zh: 我正要出門時，電話響了。

examples.en: She was about to speak when he cut her off.
examples.zh: 她正要開口時，他打斷了她。
